tEn: Hy-Embodied-0.5-VLA: From Vision-Language-Action Models to a Real-World Robot Learning Stack
tZh: Hy-Embodied-0.5-VLA：从视觉-语言-动作模型到真实世界机器人学习栈
sEn: HyVLA-0.5 is an end-to-end system covering the full robot learning stack from data collection to real-world deployment.
sZh: HyVLA-0.5是一个端到端系统，覆盖从数据收集到真实世界部署的完整机器人学习栈。
absEn: In this report, we present Hy-Embodied-0.5-VLA, abbreviated as HyVLA-0.5, an end-to-end system that spans the full robot learning stack: data collection, model design, continued pre-training and supervised fine-tuning, RL post-training, and real-world deployment. Each component serves a distinct role in this stack.
absZh: 在本报告中，我们介绍了Hy-Embodied-0.5-VLA（简称HyVLA-0.5），这是一个端到端系统，涵盖了完整的机器人学习栈：数据收集、模型设计、持续预训练和监督微调、强化学习后训练以及真实世界部署。每个组件在这个栈中都扮演着独特的角色。

contrib.en: End-to-end robot learning stack spanning data collection, model design, pre-training, SFT, RL post-training, and deployment.
contrib.zh: 端到端机器人学习栈，涵盖数据收集、模型设计、预训练、微调、强化学习后训练和部署。

contrib.en: Custom fingertip UMI device with motion-capture cage for sub-millimeter-precision human demonstrations.
contrib.zh: 定制指尖UMI设备与动作捕捉系统，实现亚毫米精度的人类演示。

contrib.en: Embodied-native MoT backbone with flow-matching action expert for continuous, high-frequency control.
contrib.zh: 具身原生混合Transformer骨干网络与流匹配动作专家，实现连续高频控制。

contrib.en: Delta-chunk action representation decoupling policy from embodiment-specific kinematics.
contrib.zh: 增量块动作表示，将策略与具身特定运动学解耦。

contrib.en: FlowPRO: critic-free, reward-free offline RL using preference optimization with contrastive gradient cancellation.
contrib.zh: FlowPRO：无评论家、无奖励的离线强化学习，利用偏好优化与对比梯度取消。

contrib.en: Asynchronous inference framework with cubic Bézier action smoother for C1-continuous deployment.
contrib.zh: 异步推理框架与三次贝塞尔动作平滑器，实现C1连续部署。

limits.en: UMI data collected with motion-capture cage limits in-the-wild deployment flexibility.
limits.zh: UMI数据依赖动作捕捉系统，限制了野外部署的灵活性。

limits.en: Cross-embodiment transfer evaluated only on a limited set of tasks and robots.
limits.zh: 跨具身迁移仅在有限任务和机器人上评估。

limits.en: FlowPRO requires teleoperated intervention-and-rollback pipeline for preference data collection.
limits.zh: FlowPRO需要遥操作干预与回滚流程来收集偏好数据。

limits.en: Deployment-time execution speed and safety trade-offs not fully addressed.
limits.zh: 部署时的执行速度与安全性权衡尚未完全解决。

limits.en: Zero-shot generalization not studied; data scale may still be insufficient.
limits.zh: 未研究零样本泛化；数据规模可能仍不足。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Overview of Hy-Embodied-0.5-VLA. An end-to-end VLA system that pairs the Hy-Embodied-0.5-MoT backbone with a flow-matching action expert under a delta-chunk action representation, pre-trained on a 1010K-hour egocentric UMI corpus and refined with a reward-free, Proximalized Preference Optimization (PRO)-based offline RL stage (FlowPRO). A single pre-trained checkpoint specializes along two parallel post-training tracks for cross-embodiment transfer to morphologically unseen robots.
items.capZh: 图1：Hy-Embodied-0.5-VLA 概览。一个端到端的 VLA 系统，将 Hy-Embodied-0.5-MoT 骨干网络与基于 delta-chunk 动作表示的流匹配动作专家配对，在 1010K 小时的以自我为中心的 UMI 语料库上预训练，并通过无奖励的、基于近端偏好优化（PRO）的离线 RL 阶段（FlowPRO）进行精炼。单个预训练检查点沿着两条并行的后训练轨道专门化，用于跨具身迁移到形态未知的机器人。

items.en: Recent advances in Vision-Language-Action (VLA) architectures have demonstrated promising capabilities in continuous robotic control [7, 32, 42, 6, 22, 25]. Yet turning these model advances into deployable generalist robots requires more than stronger policies: the data, training, adaptation, and execution layers must be co-designed around real-hardware constraints.
items.zh: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）架构的最新进展已在连续机器人控制中展现出有前景的能力 [7, 32, 42, 6, 22, 25]。然而，将这些模型进展转化为可部署的通用机器人需要的不仅仅是更强的策略：数据、训练、适应和执行层必须围绕真实硬件约束共同设计。

items.en: These system-level requirements expose three coupled challenges on the data side. First, traditional teleoperation [57, 56] relies on master–slave interfaces that force operators to unnaturally adapt to the robot’s workspace, lacks direct haptic feedback, and therefore precludes delicate manipulation. Second, while leveraging human data [51, 19] or hand-held frameworks such as UMI [10] alleviates data scarcity, these alternatives introduce new limitations: raw human demonstrations greatly enrich behavioral diversity but provide overly coarse action labels, and existing UMI rigs improve localization through SLAM at the cost of cumbersome handheld devices that fail to capture fingertip-level force transmission. Third, bridging the cross-embodiment gap involves more than adapting kinematics: it requires addressing the embodiment gap between human and robot motion spaces, the control gap induced by different dynamics and actuation, and the perception gap between human egocentric views and robot-mounted camera observations.
items.zh: 这些系统级要求在数据方面暴露了三个相互关联的挑战。首先，传统遥操作 [57, 56] 依赖于主从接口，迫使操作者不自然地适应机器人的工作空间，缺乏直接的触觉反馈，因此排除了精细操作。其次，虽然利用人类数据 [51, 19] 或手持框架（如 UMI [10]）缓解了数据稀缺性，但这些替代方案引入了新的限制：原始的人类演示极大地丰富了行为多样性，但提供了过于粗略的动作标签，现有的 UMI 设备通过 SLAM 改进了定位，但代价是笨重的手持设备无法捕捉指尖级别的力传递。第三，弥合跨具身差距不仅仅是适应运动学：它需要解决人类和机器人运动空间之间的具身差距、由不同动力学和驱动引起的控制差距，以及人类自我中心视角与机器人安装的相机观察之间的感知差距。

items.en: Beyond data, the architectural design, training paradigms, and deployment stack of VLA models present equally critical bottlenecks. Early approaches largely relied on autoregressive modeling over discretized action tokens [8, 17], which inherently limits both execution speed and control precision. Recent frameworks mitigate this by coupling a Vision-Language Model with a flow-matching action expert that predicts continuous actions [7], yet their foundational visual backbones are not explicitly engineered for robotic control: a significant gap remains between generalist visual representations and the dense spatiotemporal reasoning required for physical interaction. On top of representational issues, standard imitation learning struggles to reach last-mile dexterity, while existing reinforcement learning recipes for continuous control typically depend on brittle reward models or value networks [31]. Finally, even a well-trained policy is of limited use unless it can be served at high frequency in a closed visual loop on real hardware—a deployment constraint that is rarely treated as a first-class design target. Addressing these combined bottlenecks therefore requires a unified pipeline that jointly tackles data, model, policy refinement, and deployment.
items.zh: 除了数据，VLA 模型的架构设计、训练范式和部署堆栈同样构成了关键瓶颈。早期方法主要依赖于对离散化动作令牌的自回归建模 [8, 17]，这本质上限制了执行速度和控制精度。最近的框架通过将视觉-语言模型与预测连续动作的流匹配动作专家耦合来缓解这一问题 [7]，但其基础视觉骨干并非专门为机器人控制设计：通用视觉表示与物理交互所需的密集时空推理之间仍然存在显著差距。在表示问题之上，标准模仿学习难以达到最后的灵巧性，而现有的用于连续控制的强化学习方法通常依赖于脆弱的奖励模型或价值网络 [31]。最后，即使是一个训练有素的策略，除非它能在真实硬件上的闭环视觉回路中以高频率提供服务，否则其用途有限——这一部署约束很少被视为首要设计目标。因此，解决这些综合瓶颈需要一个统一的流水线，共同处理数据、模型、策略精炼和部署。

items.en: To address these challenges, we present Hy-Embodied-0.5-VLA (Fig. 1), an end-to-end system that spans the full stack—from custom data-collection hardware to production-ready deployment. Rather than treating VLA modeling as an isolated problem, HyVLA-0.5 is organized as a complete pipeline in which data, modeling, RL post-training, and deployment each serve a distinct role.
items.zh: 为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 Hy-Embodied-0.5-VLA（图 1），一个端到端的系统，涵盖从定制数据收集硬件到生产就绪部署的完整堆栈。HyVLA-0.5 不是将 VLA 建模视为一个孤立问题，而是组织为一个完整的流水线，其中数据、建模、RL 后训练和部署各自扮演不同的角色。

items.en: For data, we build a custom fingertip UMI device paired with a motion-capture cage, and use it to collect over 1010K hours of egocentric, sub-millimeter-precision human demonstrations. The fingertip form factor restores natural haptic perception that bulky handheld rigs cannot offer; the motion-capture cage produces high-fidelity action labels beyond the reach of SLAM-only pipelines; and the egocentric viewpoint supplies global semantic context rather than over-relying on local wrist cameras. Crucially, the same trajectories can also directly serve as post-training data, making them reusable for downstream adaptation and reducing the need for separate target-robot data collection (Sec. 3.1).
items.zh: 在数据方面，我们构建了一个定制的指尖 UMI 设备，配有一个动作捕捉笼，并用它收集了超过 1010K 小时的自我中心、亚毫米精度的人类演示。指尖外形恢复了笨重手持设备无法提供的自然触觉感知；动作捕捉笼产生的高保真动作标签超出了仅 SLAM 流水线的能力；自我中心视角提供了全局语义上下文，而不是过度依赖局部腕部相机。关键的是，相同的轨迹也可以直接作为后训练数据，使其可重复用于下游适应，并减少对单独目标机器人数据收集的需求（第 3.1 节）。

items.en: For modeling, we extend our Hy-Embodied-0.5 [44] backbone—a 4B Mixture-of-Transformers VLM pre-trained on embodied corpora—with a flow-matching action expert for continuous, high-frequency action prediction. Compared with adapting general-purpose VLMs [4, 45, 20], this embodied-native initialization yields stronger spatial priors and faster post-training convergence. We further introduce a compact memory encoder for spatiotemporal context, and adopt a delta-chunk action representation that predicts incremental end-effector motion between consecutive steps. The delta-chunk formulation decouples policy learning from embodiment-specific kinematics and substantially shrinks the optimization search space, providing a clean substrate for cross-embodiment post-training and deployment (Secs. 2 and 5.1).
items.zh: 在建模方面，我们将 Hy-Embodied-0.5 [44] 骨干网络——一个在具身语料库上预训练的 4B Mixture-of-Transformers VLM——与一个用于连续、高频动作预测的流匹配动作专家扩展。与适应通用 VLM [4, 45, 20] 相比，这种具身原生初始化产生了更强的空间先验和更快的后训练收敛。我们进一步引入了一个紧凑的记忆编码器用于时空上下文，并采用 delta-chunk 动作表示，预测连续步骤之间的增量末端执行器运动。delta-chunk 公式将策略学习与具身特定运动学解耦，并大幅缩小了优化搜索空间，为跨具身后训练和部署提供了干净的基底（第 2 节和第 5.1 节）。

items.en: For continued pre-training and fine-tuning, we first pre-train HyVLA-0.5 on the 1010K-hour UMI corpus, then specialize the resulting checkpoint through task-specific supervised fine-tuning. Real-robot SFT is organized into two tracks: Track-A studies intra-embodiment adaptation with target-robot demonstrations and deployment on the same platform, while Track-B studies UMI-only cross-embodiment transfer to morphologically different robots without target-robot teleoperation (Sec. 3.3).
items.zh: 对于持续预训练和微调，我们首先在 1010K 小时的 UMI 语料库上预训练 HyVLA-0.5，然后通过任务特定的监督微调专门化得到的检查点。真实机器人 SFT 被组织成两个轨道：Track-A 研究使用目标机器人演示并在同一平台上部署的具身内适应，而 Track-B 研究仅使用 UMI 的跨具身迁移到形态不同的机器人，无需目标机器人遥操作（第 3.3 节）。

items.en: For RL post-training, we introduce FlowPRO [47], a critic-free, reward-free Proximalized Preference Optimization (PRO)-based offline reinforcement learning algorithm. Through a teleoperated intervention-and-rollback pipeline, paired success/failure trajectories are harvested directly from policy rollouts. An RPRO loss then aligns these preferences with the continuous flow-matching objective, while a contrastive gradient-cancellation property suppresses catastrophic forgetting. FlowPRO turns failure cases into a rapid iteration loop for improving long-tail manipulation robustness and driving performance toward near-ceiling success rates, without training any reward or value network (Sec. 4).
items.zh: 对于 RL 后训练，我们引入了 FlowPRO [47]，一种无评论家、无奖励的基于近端偏好优化（PRO）的离线强化学习算法。通过一个遥操作干预和回滚流水线，成对的成功/失败轨迹直接从策略 rollout 中收集。然后，RPRO 损失将这些偏好与连续流匹配目标对齐，而对比梯度取消属性抑制了灾难性遗忘。FlowPRO 将失败案例转化为快速迭代循环，用于提高长尾操作鲁棒性并将性能推向接近上限的成功率，无需训练任何奖励或价值网络（第 4 节）。

items.en: For deployment, we implement an asynchronous inference framework that overlaps backbone forward passes with action execution, and stitches successive delta chunks via a simple yet effective cubic Bézier action smoother that guarantees C1C^{1}-continuous transitions (Sec. 5). Together, these components enable high-frequency, closed-loop control on real hardware and complete the path from data collection to real-world operation on the factory floor. The rest of this report details how the full HyVLA-0.5 pipeline is built, trained, and validated across large-volume pre-training, cross-embodiment post-training, PRO-based refinement, and physical robot deployment.
items.zh: 对于部署，我们实现了一个异步推理框架，将骨干前向传递与动作执行重叠，并通过一个简单而有效的三次贝塞尔动作平滑器拼接连续的 delta-chunk，保证 C1 连续过渡（第 5 节）。这些组件共同实现了真实硬件上的高频闭环控制，并完成了从数据收集到工厂车间实际操作的路径。本报告的其余部分详细介绍了完整的 HyVLA-0.5 流水线是如何构建、训练和验证的，涵盖大规模预训练、跨具身后训练、基于 PRO 的精炼和物理机器人部署。

items.en: HyVLA-0.5 follows the vision-language-action (VLA) paradigm, in which a pre-trained vision-language model (VLM) supplies broad semantic perception and a dedicated action module translates the resulting multi-modal context into low-level robot control (Fig. 2). On top of this paradigm, HyVLA-0.5 comprises three components. Firstly, the backbone is the embodied VLM Hy-Embodied-0.5 [44], which adopts a Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) architecture [21] with modality-adaptive computation and native-resolution image encoding. Secondly, an action expert generates continuous action chunks through conditional flow matching [7, 23], with the robotics-specific state and action streams kept separate from the VLM and coupled to it through shared attention. Finally, the image encoder is extended into a compact memory encoder that aggregates a multi-frame observation history through interleaved temporal-spatial attention [35]. We first formalize the problem in Sec. 2.1, and then detail the backbone (Sec. 2.2), the action expert (Sec. 2.3), and the compact memory encoder (Sec. 2.4).
items.zh: HyVLA-0.5 遵循视觉-语言-动作（VLA）范式，其中预训练的视觉-语言模型（VLM）提供广泛的语义感知，专用的动作模块将产生的多模态上下文转化为低级机器人控制（图 2）。在此范式之上，HyVLA-0.5 包含三个组件。首先，骨干网络是具身 VLM Hy-Embodied-0.5 [44]，它采用 Mixture-of-Transformers（MoT）架构 [21]，具有模态自适应计算和原生分辨率图像编码。其次，一个动作专家通过条件流匹配 [7, 23] 生成连续动作块，机器人特定的状态和动作流与 VLM 分离，并通过共享注意力与之耦合。最后，图像编码器被扩展为一个紧凑的记忆编码器，通过交错的时空注意力 [35] 聚合多帧观察历史。我们首先在第 2.1 节形式化问题，然后详细描述骨干网络（第 2.2 节）、动作专家（第 2.3 节）和紧凑记忆编码器（第 2.4 节）。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Architectural overview of HyVLA-0.5. The framework adopts a MoT architecture to facilitate cross-modal interactions via a shared joint-attention mechanism. To effectively process KK-frame multi-view RGB sequences, the image encoder is extended into a compact memory encoder. Specifically, temporal attention blocks are interleaved every four layers to enforce causal masking across the temporal dimension and seamlessly incorporate historical visual context. As depicted on the right, the attention mask demonstrates our block-wise causal attention strategy. Following Hy-Embodied-0.5 [44], we apply local bidirectional attention to model the multi-view observations.
items.capZh: 图2：HyVLA-0.5 的架构概览。该框架采用 MoT 架构，通过共享的联合注意力机制促进跨模态交互。为了有效处理 K 帧多视角 RGB 序列，图像编码器被扩展为紧凑的记忆编码器。具体来说，时间注意力块每四层交错一次，以在时间维度上强制因果掩码，并无缝整合历史视觉上下文。如右侧所示，注意力掩码展示了我们的逐块因果注意力策略。遵循 Hy-Embodied-0.5 [44]，我们应用局部双向注意力来建模多视角观察。

items.en: We formulate manipulation as a goal-conditioned, chunk-level control problem. At every decision step tt, the policy consumes a multi-modal observation 𝐨t\mathbf{o}_{t} and predicts a chunk of future actions 𝐀t\mathbf{A}_{t}; that is, we model the conditional distribution p⁡(𝐀t∣𝐨t)p(\mathbf{A}_{t}\mid\mathbf{o}_{t}). Formally,
items.zh: 我们将操作形式化为一个目标条件、块级控制问题。在每个决策步骤 t，策略消费多模态观察 o_t 并预测未来动作块 A_t；也就是说，我们建模条件分布 p(A_t | o_t)。形式上，

items.en: where ℐt\mathcal{I}_{t} is the visual stream, ℓ\ell the language instruction, 𝐬t\mathbf{s}_{t} the proprioceptive state, and AtA_{t} the predicted action chunk of horizon HH. We describe each component below.
items.zh: 其中 I_t 是视觉流，ℓ 是语言指令，s_t 是本体感觉状态，A_t 是预测的视界 H 的动作块。我们在下面描述每个组件。

items.en: Visual Input. The visual stream ℐt\mathcal{I}_{t} is a multi-view, multi-frame RGB observation: at step tt it comprises the KK most recent frames from each of the nn camera viewpoints (e.g. a head-mounted view together with a wrist-mounted view per arm), i.e. n×Kn{\times}K images in total. The history length KK is a configurable hyperparameter; its value at each training stage is specified in Sec. 3, with K=1K{=}1 recovering the single-frame case.
items.zh: 视觉输入。视觉流 I_t 是一个多视角、多帧 RGB 观察：在步骤 t，它包含来自每个 n 个相机视角（例如，一个头戴式视角加上每个手臂的腕部视角）的最近 K 帧，即总共 n×K 张图像。历史长度 K 是一个可配置的超参数；其在每个训练阶段的值在第 3 节中指定，其中 K=1 恢复单帧情况。

items.en: Language Input. A natural-language task instruction ℓ\ell (e.g. ‘‘hang the mug on the rack’’) defines the goal. It is tokenized and jointly encoded with the visual stream by the VLM backbone, enabling the policy to ground its behaviors in the commanded semantics.
items.zh: 语言输入。自然语言任务指令 ℓ（例如，“将杯子挂在架子上”）定义了目标。它被分词并与视觉流由 VLM 骨干网络联合编码，使策略能够将其行为基于命令语义。

items.en: Proprioceptive Input. The robot state 𝐬t\mathbf{s}_{t} encodes the current pose of the controlled end-effector(s) and is projected into the backbone embedding space, providing the embodiment-grounded context that anchors action prediction to the robot’s present configuration.
items.zh: 本体感觉输入。机器人状态 s_t 编码受控末端执行器的当前姿态，并被投影到骨干网络嵌入空间，提供锚定动作预测到机器人当前配置的具身上下文。

items.en: Action Output. Instead of single-step execution, the policy predicts an entire action chunk [57] of horizon HH per inference cycle. This ensures temporally smooth, high-frequency control while significantly reducing the inference latency, as the VLM backbone is evaluated only once to condition the entire HH-step generation via flow matching.
items.zh: 动作输出。策略不是单步执行，而是在每个推理周期预测一个视界 H 的完整动作块 [57]。这确保了时间平滑、高频控制，同时显著降低了推理延迟，因为 VLM 骨干网络仅被评估一次，以通过流匹配条件化整个 H 步生成。

items.en: End-effector-frame Representation. Both the proprioceptive state sts_{t} and the action 𝐚t′\mathbf{a}_{t^{\prime}} are formulated in the end-effector frame (EEF), an embodiment-agnostic representation that decouples the policy from robot-specific joint kinematics. For each controlled arm, a pose is parameterized by a 33-D Cartesian translation (xyz) and a 66-D continuous rotation representation [53], augmented by a 11-D normalized gripper command, i.e., 𝐬t,𝐚t′∈ℝ10\mathbf{s}_{t},\mathbf{a}_{t^{\prime}}\in\mathbb{R}^{10} per arm. The proprioceptive state sts_{t} is defined in the end-effector frame with respect to the embodiment root, while each future action 𝐚t′\mathbf{a}_{t^{\prime}} is a delta-chunk defined in the relative EEF that takes the current state sts_{t} as its reference frame.
items.zh: 末端执行器框架表示。本体感觉状态 s_t 和动作 a_{t'} 都在末端执行器框架（EEF）中表述，这是一种与具身无关的表示，将策略与机器人特定的关节运动学解耦。对于每个受控手臂，姿态由 3D 笛卡尔平移（xyz）和 6D 连续旋转表示 [53] 参数化，并增加一个 1D 归一化夹爪命令，即每个手臂 s_t, a_{t'} ∈ ℝ^{10}。本体感觉状态 s_t 在末端执行器框架中相对于具身根定义，而每个未来动作 a_{t'} 是一个 delta-chunk，在相对 EEF 中定义，以当前状态 s_t 作为其参考框架。

items.en: Optional Co-Training Tasks. Beyond learning from action-labeled trajectories, the unified VLA architecture integrates auxiliary next-token prediction tasks to preserve its foundational vision-language reasoning and spatial grounding capabilities. We denote this auxiliary data mixture as 𝒟ct=𝒟VQA∪𝒟2​D∪𝒟3​D\mathcal{D}_{\mathrm{ct}}=\mathcal{D}_{\mathrm{VQA}}\cup\mathcal{D}_{\mathrm{2D}}\cup\mathcal{D}_{\mathrm{3D}}. Each training instance is formulated as a pair (𝐜,y1:M)(\mathbf{c},y_{1:M}), where 𝐜\mathbf{c} represents the vision-language conditions, and y1:My_{1:M} denotes a sequence of MM serialized target tokens. Depending on the specific task, y1:My_{1:M} consists of semantic answer tokens for VQA, normalized 2D spatial coordinates, or 3D geometric parameters formulated within the camera or scene frame. Crucially, this co-training objective directly optimizes the parameters of the shared VLM backbone, ensuring it maintains and enriches the vital semantic and spatial representations.
items.zh: 可选共训练任务。除了从动作标记轨迹学习，统一的 VLA 架构集成了辅助的下一个词预测任务，以保持其基础视觉-语言推理和空间定位能力。我们将此辅助数据混合记为 D_ct = D_VQA ∪ D_2D ∪ D_3D。每个训练实例被形式化为一个对 (c, y_{1:M})，其中 c 表示视觉-语言条件，y_{1:M} 表示 M 个序列化目标令牌的序列。根据具体任务，y_{1:M} 由 VQA 的语义答案令牌、归一化的 2D 空间坐标或相机或场景框架内表述的 3D 几何参数组成。关键的是，这个共训练目标直接优化共享 VLM 骨干网络的参数，确保它维持并丰富关键的语义和空间表示。

items.en: HyVLA-0.5 builds upon the embodied VLM Hy-Embodied-0.5-MoT [44], a compact model with 44 B parameters optimized for edge deployment. It instantiates the standard image-encoder-plus-language-model recipe, and we detail three key design choices adapted for manipulation.
items.zh: HyVLA-0.5 基于具身 VLM Hy-Embodied-0.5-MoT [44] 构建，这是一个紧凑的 44B 参数模型，针对边缘部署进行了优化。它实例化了标准的图像编码器加语言模型方案，我们详细介绍了为操作任务调整的三个关键设计选择。

items.en: Native-resolution visual encoding. The backbone encodes images with Hy-ViT 2.0, a native-resolution Vision Transformer (ViT) [13, 12] that accepts arbitrary input resolutions and is distilled from a larger internal teacher. Each camera stream can therefore be processed at its native resolution rather than being down-sampled to a fixed size.
items.zh: 原生分辨率视觉编码。骨干网络使用 Hy-ViT 2.0 编码图像，这是一种原生分辨率视觉 Transformer (ViT) [13, 12]，可接受任意输入分辨率，并从更大的内部教师模型中蒸馏得到。因此，每个摄像头流可以在其原生分辨率下处理，而无需下采样到固定尺寸。

items.en: Modality-adaptive Computation via MoT. The backbone adopts a Mixture of Transformers (MoT) architecture [21], which is directly initialized with the pre-trained weights of HY-Embodied-0.5 [44]. This design maintains non-shared QKV and FFN parameters for the visual and textual streams. Specifically, during the forward pass, all visual tokens extracted by the ViT are computed using a duplicated, vision-specific parameter set, whereas textual tokens are processed using the original language parameters. Cross-modal interaction is strictly limited to the shared self-attention layers. Consequently, the visual and textual parameters are updated independently. Furthermore, following the original configuration of HY-Embodied-0.5 [44], the backbone applies bidirectional attention strictly among the visual tokens of each individual image, while maintaining standard causal attention for the language tokens.
items.zh: 通过 MoT 实现模态自适应计算。骨干网络采用混合 Transformer (MoT) 架构 [21]，该架构直接使用 HY-Embodied-0.5 [44] 的预训练权重初始化。这种设计为视觉和文本流保持非共享的 QKV 和 FFN 参数。具体来说，在前向传播过程中，ViT 提取的所有视觉标记使用复制的、视觉特定的参数集进行计算，而文本标记则使用原始语言参数处理。跨模态交互严格限制在共享的自注意力层中。因此，视觉和文本参数独立更新。此外，遵循 HY-Embodied-0.5 [44] 的原始配置，骨干网络在每张图像的视觉标记之间严格应用双向注意力，同时对语言标记保持标准因果注意力。

items.en: Co-training Objective. For the auxiliary VQA and spatial grounding instances sampled from 𝒟ct\mathcal{D}_{\mathrm{ct}}, the VLM backbone employs its native language modeling head to autoregressively decode the serialized target tokens. We optimize this process via a standard next-token prediction objective:
items.zh: 协同训练目标。对于从 𝒟ct 中采样的辅助 VQA 和空间定位实例，VLM 骨干网络使用其原生语言建模头自回归解码序列化的目标标记。我们通过标准的下一个词预测目标来优化此过程：

items.en: where yjy_{j} denotes the jj-th serialized target token.
items.zh: 其中 yj 表示第 j 个序列化的目标标记。

full.sec: 2.3 Action Expert with Dual-Tower Flow Matching

items.en: Rather than discretizing actions into language-like tokens, HyVLA-0.5 equips the backbone with an action expert that models the continuous distribution p⁡(𝐀t∣𝐨t)p(\mathbf{A}_{t}\mid\mathbf{o}_{t}) directly via conditional flow matching [23].
items.zh: HyVLA-0.5 没有将动作离散化为类似语言的标记，而是为骨干网络配备了一个动作专家，通过条件流匹配 [23] 直接建模连续分布 p(𝐀t∣𝐨t)。

items.en: Dual-tower Routing. On top of the MoT backbone, HyVLA-0.5 separates the joint transformer into an understanding-oriented VLM tower and a generation-oriented action-expert tower. The VLM tower processes visual and textual context with the modality-adaptive parameters described above, while the action expert consumes the projected robot state and noisy action tokens [𝐬t,𝐀tτ][\mathbf{s}_{t},\mathbf{A}_{t}^{\tau}] to produce the continuous action velocity field. The two towers interact through shared self-attention, allowing grounded visual-language context to guide action generation.
items.zh: 双塔路由。在 MoT 骨干网络之上，HyVLA-0.5 将联合 Transformer 分离为面向理解的 VLM 塔和面向生成的动作专家塔。VLM 塔使用上述模态自适应参数处理视觉和文本上下文，而动作专家则消耗投影的机器人状态和噪声动作标记 [𝐬t, 𝐀tτ] 以生成连续动作速度场。两个塔通过共享自注意力进行交互，使得基于视觉-语言上下文能够指导动作生成。

items.en: Block-wise Causal Attention. We partition the token sequence into three blocks, [ℐt,ℓ][\,\mathcal{I}_{t},\ell\,], [𝐬t][\,\mathbf{s}_{t}\,], and [𝐚t,0τ,…,𝐚t,H−1τ][\,\mathbf{a}^{\tau}_{t,0},\dots,\mathbf{a}^{\tau}_{t,H-1}\,], and apply attention that is bidirectional within each block but strictly causal across blocks. The perception block is prevented from attending to the robotics-specific blocks, minimizing distribution shift from VLM pre-training; the state block is isolated so that its keys and values can be cached; and the noisy-action block attends to the full prefix.
items.zh: 分块因果注意力。我们将标记序列划分为三个块：[ℐt, ℓ]、[𝐬t] 和 [𝐚t,0τ, …, 𝐚t,H-1τ]，并应用注意力机制：每个块内双向，但块间严格因果。感知块被阻止关注机器人特定块，以最小化与 VLM 预训练的分布偏移；状态块被隔离，以便其键和值可以被缓存；噪声动作块关注完整前缀。

items.en: Flow-matching Objective. Let 𝐀tτ=τ​𝐀t+(1−τ)​ϵ\mathbf{A}^{\tau}_{t}=\tau\mathbf{A}_{t}+(1-\tau)\epsilon with ϵ∼𝒩⁡(𝟎,𝐈)\epsilon\sim\mathcal{N}(\mathbf{0},\mathbf{I}) denote the noisy action chunk at flow timestep τ∈[0,1]\tau\in[0,1]. The action expert regresses the velocity field vθv_{\theta} that transports noise to the target actions, trained with
items.zh: 流匹配目标。令 𝐀tτ = τ𝐀t + (1-τ)ϵ，其中 ϵ ∼ 𝒩(𝟎, 𝐈)，表示在流时间步 τ ∈ [0,1] 处的噪声动作块。动作专家回归速度场 vθ，该速度场将噪声传输到目标动作，训练目标为：

items.en: where 𝐀t\mathbf{A}_{t} is the ground-truth chunk, 𝐀tτ\mathbf{A}^{\tau}_{t} its noised version, 𝐀θ​(𝐀tτ,𝐨t)\mathbf{A}_{\theta}(\mathbf{A}^{\tau}_{t},\mathbf{o}_{t}) the predicted velocity conditioned on the observation oto_{t}, and ϵ−At\epsilon-A_{t} the target denoising direction. The flow timestep τ\tau is sampled from a Beta distribution skewed toward high-noise regimes, which emphasizes the harder, more informative stages of action denoising. When auxiliary data is mixed with robot demonstrations, the total objective is ℒ⁡(θ)=ℒfm​(θ)+λntp​ℒntp​(θ)\mathcal{L}(\theta)=\mathcal{L}_{\text{fm}}(\theta)+\lambda_{\text{ntp}}\mathcal{L}_{\text{ntp}}(\theta), with λntp=0\lambda_{\text{ntp}}{=}0 recovering action-only training.
items.zh: 其中 𝐀t 是真实动作块，𝐀tτ 是其噪声版本，𝐀θ(𝐀tτ, 𝐨t) 是基于观测 ot 预测的速度，ϵ - At 是目标去噪方向。流时间步 τ 从偏向高噪声区域的 Beta 分布中采样，这强调了动作去噪中更困难、信息更丰富的阶段。当辅助数据与机器人演示混合时，总目标为 ℒ(θ) = ℒfm(θ) + λntp ℒntp(θ)，其中 λntp=0 恢复纯动作训练。

items.en: Inference. At deployment, the policy generates an action chunk by integrating the learned velocity field from τ=0\tau{=}0 to τ=1\tau{=}1 via the forward Euler update 𝐀tτ+δ=𝐀tτ+δ​𝐯θ​(𝐀tτ,𝐨t)\mathbf{A}^{\tau+\delta}_{t}=\mathbf{A}^{\tau}_{t}+\delta\,\mathbf{v}_{\theta}(\mathbf{A}^{\tau}_{t},\mathbf{o}_{t}) over 1010 integration steps (δ=0.1\delta{=}0.1). Because the conditioning observation prefix 𝐨t\mathbf{o}_{t} remains constant across all solver iterations, its keys and values are cached during the initial forward pass. Consequently, subsequent steps exclusively recompute the action tokens, significantly reducing computational overhead.
items.zh: 推理。在部署时，策略通过前向欧拉更新 𝐀tτ+δ = 𝐀tτ + δ 𝐯θ(𝐀tτ, 𝐨t) 从 τ=0 到 τ=1 积分学习到的速度场，共 10 个积分步（δ=0.1）。由于条件观测前缀 𝐨t 在所有求解器迭代中保持不变，其键和值在初始前向传播期间被缓存。因此，后续步骤仅重新计算动作标记，显著降低了计算开销。

full.sec: 2.4 Compact Memory Encoder with Temporal-Spatial Attention
full.secZh: 2.4 时空注意力紧凑记忆编码器

items.en: HyVLA-0.5 conditions on the KK-frame multi-view history ℐt\mathcal{I}_{t} of Eq. (1) to form a compact memory encoding. Encoding all n×Kn{\times}K frames independently and forwarding them to the backbone would multiply the visual token count passed to the VLM. We instead extend the image encoder into a video encoder that compresses the temporal dimension before tokens reach the VLM backbone.
items.zh: HyVLA-0.5 以公式 (1) 中的 K 帧多视角历史 ℐt 为条件，形成紧凑的记忆编码。独立编码所有 n×K 帧并将其转发到骨干网络会成倍增加传递给 VLM 的视觉标记数量。我们转而将图像编码器扩展为视频编码器，在标记到达 VLM 骨干网络之前压缩时间维度。

items.en: Factorized Temporal-spatial Attention. Following Pi-MEM [35], the video encoder preserves the patchify-then-attend structure of a standard ViT and inserts a temporal pass once every LL layers. At such a layer, we add a fixed sinusoidal temporal encoding e⁡(k)e(k) (with e⁡(0)=𝟎e(0)=\mathbf{0}) and reuse the same QKV\mathrm{QKV} and output projection WOW_{O} of the underlying ViT block, then factorize the attention into two passes that share these projections:
items.zh: 分解的时空注意力。遵循 Pi-MEM [35]，视频编码器保留了标准 ViT 的“分块-然后-注意力”结构，并每 L 层插入一次时间传递。在该层，我们添加固定的正弦时间编码 e(k)（其中 e(0)=𝟎），并重用底层 ViT 块的相同 QKV 和输出投影 WO，然后将注意力分解为共享这些投影的两个传递：

items.en: where X~k\tilde{X}_{k} is the attention output that the block feeds into its residual connection and MLP. The temporal pass is a causal attention, so each frame attends only to the present and past, matching the streaming nature of on-robot perception. The spatial pass is the original bidirectional self-attention within a frame, applied to the time-mixed values V~\tilde{V}. This factorization avoids the 𝒪⁡(n2​K2)\mathcal{O}(n^{2}K^{2}) cost of joint space-time attention and reduces the per-layer cost to 𝒪⁡(K​n2+n​K2)\mathcal{O}(Kn^{2}+nK^{2}).
items.zh: 其中 X̃k 是该块馈入其残差连接和 MLP 的注意力输出。时间传递是因果注意力，因此每帧仅关注当前和过去，与机器人感知的流式特性相匹配。空间传递是帧内的原始双向自注意力，应用于时间混合后的值 Ṽ。这种分解避免了 𝒪(n²K²) 的联合时空注意力成本，并将每层成本降低到 𝒪(Kn² + nK²)。

items.en: Token-count-preserving compression. In the upper layers of the video encoder we discard the patch representations of past frames and forward only the current-frame tokens to the backbone. Because the interleaved temporal attention has already baked the historical context into the current-frame representation, the number of visual tokens passed to the VLM matches that of a single-frame policy.
items.zh: 保持标记数量的压缩。在视频编码器的上层，我们丢弃过去帧的块表示，仅将当前帧的标记转发到骨干网络。由于交错的时间注意力已将历史上下文融入当前帧表示，传递给 VLM 的视觉标记数量与单帧策略相同。

items.en: Parameter-free, Transfer-friendly Design. The video encoder introduces no new learnable parameters relative to the single-image Hy-ViT 2.0: both passes reuse the QKV\mathrm{QKV} and WOW_{O} projections of Eq. (4)–(5), and the temporal encoding e⁡(k)e(k) is a fixed sinusoid with e⁡(0)=𝟎e(0)=\mathbf{0} rather than a learned table. Consequently, when K=1K{=}1 the causal temporal attention is the identity and e⁡(0)=𝟎e(0)=\mathbf{0} leaves the input unchanged, so each augmented block reduces exactly to the pre-trained ViT block. The memory-augmented backbone is therefore initialized directly from the Hy-Embodied-0.5 weights and recovers the single-frame encoder as a special case.
items.zh: 无参数、易于迁移的设计。与单图像 Hy-ViT 2.0 相比，视频编码器没有引入新的可学习参数：两个传递都重用公式 (4)-(5) 中的 QKV 和 WO 投影，时间编码 e(k) 是固定的正弦函数，e(0)=𝟎，而不是学习得到的表。因此，当 K=1 时，因果时间注意力是恒等映射，e(0)=𝟎 使输入保持不变，因此每个增强块精确退化为预训练的 ViT 块。因此，记忆增强的骨干网络直接从 Hy-Embodied-0.5 权重初始化，并将单帧编码器作为特例恢复。

items.en: This section focuses on the supervised stages of HyVLA-0.5 training: large-scale pre-training on the Hy-UMI-10K corpus to learn a generalist action prior, followed by supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on task-specific demonstrations from each target embodiment.
items.zh: 本节重点介绍 HyVLA-0.5 训练的监督阶段：在 Hy-UMI-10K 语料库上进行大规模预训练以学习通用动作先验，然后针对每个目标具身形态的任务特定演示进行监督微调 (SFT)。

items.en: HyVLA-0.5 is pre-trained on Hy-UMI-10K, a hand-held Universal Manipulation Interface (UMI) dataset [10] of more than 1010K hours collected in-house (Fig. 4), and it is the sole data source for pre-training. Unlike standard UMI pipelines that recover gripper poses from on-board visual SLAM, our capture rig tracks each gripper with an external optical motion-capture system, which labels every 6-DoF trajectory at sub-millimetre precision in a single, globally consistent world frame—hence high-fidelity. We describe its capture device, composition, and the pre-training recipe below.
items.zh: HyVLA-0.5 在 Hy-UMI-10K 上进行预训练，这是一个手持式通用操作接口 (UMI) 数据集 [10]，包含超过 10K 小时的内部收集数据（图 4），并且是预训练的唯一数据源。与标准 UMI 流程（通过机载视觉 SLAM 恢复夹爪姿态）不同，我们的采集装置使用外部光学运动捕捉系统跟踪每个夹爪，以亚毫米精度在单个全局一致的世界坐标系中标记每个 6-DoF 轨迹——因此具有高保真度。下面我们描述其采集设备、组成和预训练方案。

items.en: Demonstrations are acquired with custom-designed hand-held UMI grippers detached from kinematics of specific embodiments (Fig. 3). The gripper design follows that of a commonly adopted industrial gripper, Changingtek CTAG2F90, to help reduce deployment gap. The gripper-mounted camera is located close to the gripper surface, minimizing collisions of the protruding camera when operating in tight space. Gripper openness is measured by the rotary encoders at gripper joints producing sub-millimetre accuracy, without relying on visual identification of gripper openness. Gripper poses are tracked by an external optical motion-capture system which resolves each 6-DoF trajectory at sub-millimetre precision in a single global Cartesian frame and also synchronises the head RGB-D camera to avoid interference of IR emissions. This optical tracking replaces the on-board visual SLAM used by conventional UMI rigs, obtaining superior accuracy in pose trajectories with minimal operational risks of pose jitters and track losses due to temporary lack of visual features in SLAM-based pose estimation systems. This setup with optical tracking systems prioritizes high quality action labels for tasks involving fine motor skills, at the cost of inconvenient in-the-wild deployment. The grippers are designed with ergonomic finger-attached mechanisms that allow direct actuation with contact and force feedback onto human fingers rather than relying on indirect trigger-based actuation with less obvious force feedback. Some grippers are optionally instrumented with 6-dimensional force torque sensors located at the tips, and their fingers are attached to the operator’s own fingers rather than operated through mechanical triggers, giving a proprioception-aligned mapping between human intent and recorded action, and the tip-located sensors allow more direct measurements of force intent compared wrist-located sensors. Because the recording is anchored to the gripper rather than to any fixed base, the corpus is free of base-placement variance. The rigs capture RGB-D streams, though in the current version of HyVLA-0.5, only the RGB modality is consumed in training, while depth data remain available for future training stages.
items.zh: 演示使用定制的、与特定具身形态运动学分离的手持式 UMI 夹爪获取（图 3）。夹爪设计遵循广泛采用的工业夹爪 Changingtek CTAG2F90，以帮助减少部署差距。夹爪安装的摄像头靠近夹爪表面，最大限度地减少了在狭小空间操作时突出摄像头的碰撞。夹爪开度通过夹爪关节处的旋转编码器测量，精度达到亚毫米级，无需依赖视觉识别夹爪开度。夹爪姿态由外部光学运动捕捉系统跟踪，该系统在单个全局笛卡尔坐标系中以亚毫米精度解析每个 6-DoF 轨迹，并同步头部 RGB-D 摄像头以避免红外发射干扰。这种光学跟踪取代了传统 UMI 装置使用的机载视觉 SLAM，在姿态轨迹方面获得了卓越的精度，并且由于基于 SLAM 的姿态估计系统中暂时缺乏视觉特征而导致的姿态抖动和跟踪丢失的操作风险最小。这种带有光学跟踪系统的设置优先考虑涉及精细运动技能的任务的高质量动作标签，但代价是不便于在野外部署。夹爪采用符合人体工程学的手指附着机制设计，允许通过接触和力反馈直接驱动人类手指，而不是依赖间接的基于触发的驱动（力反馈不太明显）。一些夹爪可选地在指尖配备 6 维力扭矩传感器，其手指附着在操作者自己的手指上，而不是通过机械触发器操作，从而在人类意图和记录的动作之间提供本体感觉对齐的映射，并且指尖传感器与腕部传感器相比能够更直接地测量力意图。由于记录以夹爪为锚点，而不是任何固定基座，因此语料库没有基座位置变化。该装置捕获 RGB-D 流，但在当前版本的 HyVLA-0.5 中，训练仅使用 RGB 模态，而深度数据仍可用于未来的训练阶段。

items.capEn: Figure 3: UMI custom data collection workstation. The in-house designed hardware setup features an external optical motion-capture system delivering sub-millimeter high-precision tracking, an ego-centric visual perspective camera with native depth capture, a 6-dimensional force-sensing gripper on each hand.
items.capZh: 图 3: UMI 定制数据采集工作站。内部设计的硬件设置包括：外部光学运动捕捉系统，提供亚毫米高精度跟踪；带原生深度捕捉的自我中心视觉摄像头；每只手配备 6 维力传感夹爪。

items.en: The corpus spans more than 11M episodes and 1010K hours of demonstrations across 70 distinct tasks, organised into six scene-based task families—Laundry Room (28.5%), Kitchen (19.2%), Personal Care & Miscellaneous (13.8%), Dexterous / Tool-use (10.4%), Storage & Organization (10.0%), and Cleaning (5.7%). These six families account for the bulk of the corpus, while the remaining tasks form a long tail spanning diverse object categories and environmental conditions. Manipulated objects cover a broad spectrum from rigid containers and tableware to precision instruments and deformable fabrics. A complete characterization of task families, object-category breakdown, and per-task hour distribution is provided in Fig. 4.
items.zh: 该语料库涵盖超过1100万个片段和101万小时的演示，涉及70个不同的任务，分为六个基于场景的任务族——洗衣房（28.5%）、厨房（19.2%）、个人护理与杂项（13.8%）、灵巧/工具使用（10.4%）、存储与整理（10.0%）和清洁（5.7%）。这六个任务族占据了语料库的大部分，其余任务则构成一个长尾，涵盖多样化的物体类别和环境条件。操作对象涵盖从刚性容器和餐具到精密仪器和可变形织物的广泛范围。任务族、物体类别细分以及每个任务的小时分布在图4中完整描述。

items.capEn: Figure 4: UMI dataset distribution. Detailed characterization of our diverse, in-house collected 10K-hour UMI demonstration corpus. The distribution outlines broad scale, diverse skill categories, environmental conditions, and manipulated objects, ensuring generalist-level manipulation capacity.
items.capZh: 图4：UMI数据集分布。我们内部收集的10万小时UMI演示语料库的详细特征描述。该分布展示了广泛的规模、多样化的技能类别、环境条件和操作对象，确保了通用级别的操作能力。

items.en: Setup. We initialize the VLM from the Hy-Embodied-0.5-MoT [44] checkpoint for pre-training. While the action expert shares the same architectural configuration as the VLM, it is instantiated and randomly initialized as an independent Transformer module. Furthermore, its hidden and intermediate sizes are scaled down from 20482048 to 10241024 and from 61446144 to 20482048, respectively, yielding an effective parameter count of 370370M. All model parameters are trainable and are optimized under the flow-matching objective (Eq. 3). To accelerate large-scale pre-training, we set K=1K{=}1, i.e., no historical image frames are used as input, so the video encoder (Sec. 2.4) reduces to the standard single-image encoder. The policy ingests 33 camera views at 224×320224{\times}320 resolution and predicts a future action chunk of horizon H=50H{=}50 at 1010 Hz.
items.zh: 设置。我们从Hy-Embodied-0.5-MoT [44]检查点初始化VLM进行预训练。虽然动作专家与VLM具有相同的架构配置，但它被实例化为一个独立的Transformer模块并随机初始化。此外，其隐藏大小和中间大小分别从2048缩小到1024，从6144缩小到2048，从而得到有效参数数量为3.7亿。所有模型参数都是可训练的，并在流匹配目标（公式3）下进行优化。为了加速大规模预训练，我们设置K=1，即不使用历史图像帧作为输入，因此视频编码器（第2.4节）简化为标准的单图像编码器。策略接收3个相机视图，分辨率为224×320，并以10 Hz的频率预测未来动作块，视界H=50。

items.en: Data and Pre-training recipe. We use the full 1010K-hour UMI corpus for pre-training. The dataloader samples the dataset with replacement: it first samples an episode from the full corpus with probability proportional to episode length, then uniformly samples one frame from that episode as the current frame, and finally takes the future action sequence with chunk size H=50H{=}50 at 1010 Hz as the ground-truth action chunk. Both state and action inputs are normalized using their dataset-wide mean and standard deviation before being fed into the network. We train for 200200K steps with a global batch size of 1,0241{,}024 and a base learning rate of 5×10−55\times 10^{-5}. The learning rate is linearly warmed up to its maximum value over the first 11K steps, decayed to one tenth of the peak value over the subsequent 160160K steps, and kept training for another 4040K steps. We use AdamW optimizer [27] and perform training in bfloat16 mixed precision.
items.zh: 数据和预训练方案。我们使用完整的10万小时UMI语料库进行预训练。数据加载器进行有放回采样：首先从完整语料库中采样一个片段，概率与片段长度成正比，然后从该片段中均匀采样一帧作为当前帧，最后以10 Hz的频率取未来动作序列（块大小H=50）作为真实动作块。状态和动作输入在输入网络前均使用数据集范围内的均值和标准差进行归一化。我们训练20万步，全局批大小为1024，基础学习率为5×10^{-5}。学习率在前1千步线性预热至最大值，在接下来的16万步中衰减至峰值的十分之一，再继续训练4万步。我们使用AdamW优化器[27]，并以bfloat16混合精度进行训练。

items.en: Setup. Initializing from the UMI pre-trained VLA checkpoint (Sec. 3.2), we run supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on task-specific demonstrations from each target embodiment under the flow-matching objective (Eq. 3). Both the VLM and action expert weights are loaded from the pre-trained model, and all parameters remain trainable. Unlike pre-training, SFT sets K=6K{=}6, enabling the video encoder of Sec. 2.4 to condition on the current frame together with five historical frames.
items.zh: 设置。从UMI预训练的VLA检查点（第3.2节）初始化，我们在流匹配目标（公式3）下，对每个目标具身体的任务特定演示进行监督微调（SFT）。VLM和动作专家权重均从预训练模型加载，所有参数保持可训练。与预训练不同，SFT设置K=6，使第2.4节的视频编码器能够以当前帧和五个历史帧为条件。

items.en: Embodiments and Data. We fine-tune our model across one simulated embodiment and four real-world platforms. In simulation, we employ the Aloha-AgileX bimanual setup from the RoboTwin 2.0 benchmark [9], covering 5050 manipulation tasks; each task provides 5050 clean-environment episodes and 500500 randomized-environment episodes, resulting in 2.752.75K episodes and more than 66M frames in total. For real-world SFT, we organize the data into two deployment tracks that separate intra-embodiment adaptation from cross-embodiment transfer. Track A (intra-embodiment) collects demonstrations through tele-operation on the same robot platform used for evaluation; here, the Dobot X-Trainer covers four tasks with 300300 demonstrations per task (1818 hours in total). Track B (cross-embodiment) fine-tunes only on task-specific UMI demonstrations and deploys to morphologically different target robots without target-robot teleoperation; this track covers one task on JAKA K1 (300300 UMI demonstrations, 1.21.2 hours) and one task on Astribot S1 (200200 UMI demonstrations, 1.51.5 hours). Separately, we use Unitree G1 (11 task, 400400 UMI demonstrations, 2.22.2 hours) for the force-modality validation in Sec. 6.2.
items.zh: 具身体与数据。我们在一个模拟具身体和四个真实世界平台上微调模型。在模拟中，我们采用RoboTwin 2.0基准[9]中的Aloha-AgileX双臂设置，涵盖50个操作任务；每个任务提供50个干净环境片段和500个随机环境片段，总计2.75千个片段和超过600万帧。对于真实世界SFT，我们将数据组织为两个部署轨道，分别处理具身体内适应和跨具身体迁移。轨道A（具身体内）通过遥操作在用于评估的同一机器人平台上收集演示；其中，Dobot X-Trainer覆盖四个任务，每个任务300个演示（总计18小时）。轨道B（跨具身体）仅对任务特定的UMI演示进行微调，并部署到形态不同的目标机器人上，无需目标机器人遥操作；该轨道覆盖JAKA K1上的一个任务（300个UMI演示，1.2小时）和Astribot S1上的一个任务（200个UMI演示，1.5小时）。另外，我们使用Unitree G1（1个任务，400个UMI演示，2.2小时）进行第6.2节的力模态验证。

items.en: Post-training recipe. For real-world deployment, actions are sampled at 5050 Hz with an action-chunk horizon of H=50H{=}50 and a history interval of 11 second. We train for 6060K steps with a global batch size of 3232 and a base learning rate of 2.5×10−52.5\times 10^{-5}, decayed over 4040K steps. For RoboTwin 2.0, due to the larger data scale, we downsample future actions from the current frame with stride 33, use an action-chunk horizon of H=20H{=}20 and a history interval of 5×5{\times}stride. The global batch size is set to 128128 and the remaining optimization settings follow the pre-training recipe. More details are described in Appendix A.
items.zh: 后训练方案。对于真实世界部署，动作以50 Hz的频率采样，动作块视界H=50，历史间隔为1秒。我们训练6万步，全局批大小为32，基础学习率为2.5×10^{-5}，在4万步内衰减。对于RoboTwin 2.0，由于数据规模较大，我们从当前帧以步长3对未来的动作进行下采样，使用动作块视界H=20，历史间隔为5倍步长。全局批大小设为128，其余优化设置遵循预训练方案。更多细节见附录A。

items.en: After supervised pre-training and SFT (Sec. 3.3), HyVLA-0.5 further improves real-robot deployment through failure-driven post-training. This stage follows the FlowPRO recipe [47], using a flow-matching-aware preference-optimization loss (RPRO) together with a teleoperated intervention-and-rollback data pipeline. In this way, HyVLA-0.5 converts a small number of real-robot corrections into measurable deployment gains without training any reward or value model.
items.zh: 在监督预训练和SFT（第3.3节）之后，HyVLA-0.5通过失败驱动的后训练进一步改进真实机器人部署。该阶段遵循FlowPRO方案[47]，使用流匹配感知的偏好优化损失（RPRO）以及遥操作干预与回滚数据流水线。通过这种方式，HyVLA-0.5将少量真实机器人修正转化为可衡量的部署增益，而无需训练任何奖励或价值模型。

items.en: As discussed in section 7, real-robot post-training generally falls into three families: SFT/DAgger, reward- or value-based RL, and preference-based RL. Their characteristic limitations motivate the three FlowPRO design principles below:
items.zh: 如第7节所述，真实机器人后训练通常分为三类：SFT/DAgger、基于奖励或价值的强化学习以及基于偏好的强化学习。它们各自的局限性催生了以下三个FlowPRO设计原则：

items.en: (P1) Exploit failures directly. Negative trajectories are not discarded or merely flagged for re-labelling; they are fed back into the action-generation loss as per-state, per-chunk contrastive signals against their paired positive corrections.
items.zh: （P1）直接利用失败。负轨迹不会被丢弃或仅标记为重新标注；它们作为每状态、每块的对比信号，与其配对的正面修正一起反馈到动作生成损失中。

items.en: (P2) Avoid reward and critic models entirely. The training signal is computed in closed form from a frozen reference policy and the current policy, using a flow-matching log-likelihood proxy. This bypasses the dense-reward-design bottleneck that plagues contact-rich manipulation.
items.zh: （P2）完全避免奖励和评论家模型。训练信号通过冻结的参考策略和当前策略，使用流匹配对数似然代理以闭式形式计算。这绕过了困扰接触丰富操作的密集奖励设计瓶颈。

items.en: (P3) Anchor the implicit reward. A symmetric proximal regularizer prevents the absolute magnitude of the implicit reward from exploding. This structurally forbids the plain-DPO reward-hacking failure mode in which the policy drifts away from both awa^{w} and ala^{l}.
items.zh: （P3）锚定隐式奖励。一个对称的近端正则化器防止隐式奖励的绝对值爆炸。这从结构上禁止了普通DPO奖励黑客失败模式，即策略同时偏离a^w和a^l。

items.en: The remainder of this section formalises the loss (Sec. 4.2) and the data pipeline that supplies the per-state preference tuples it consumes.
items.zh: 本节剩余部分形式化损失（第4.2节）以及提供其消耗的每状态偏好元组的数据流水线。

items.capEn: Figure 5: FlowPRO data pipeline for collecting real-robot preference trajectories and converting them into dense per-state preference tuples. During policy rollouts, an operator triggers an intervention-and-rollback: the system rewinds to a prior state, logs the executed segment as a negative trajectory, and records a corrective teleoperation segment as the paired positive trajectory. A smooth-interpolation procedure then synthesizes the missing counterpart action on each branch to yield per-state tuples (s,aw,al)(s,a^{w},a^{l}) used for preference optimization.
items.capZh: 图5：FlowPRO数据流水线，用于收集真实机器人偏好轨迹并将其转换为密集的每状态偏好元组。在策略 rollout 期间，操作员触发干预与回滚：系统回退到先前状态，将已执行片段记录为负轨迹，并将修正性遥操作片段记录为配对的正面轨迹。然后，通过平滑插值过程在每个分支上合成缺失的对应动作，以生成用于偏好优化的每状态元组(s, a^w, a^l)。

items.en: FlowPRO proceeds as an iterative offline-RL loop on top of an SFT-pretrained HyVLA-0.5 base policy (Fig. 5). Each round contains three steps: (1) collect on-robot preference pairs via teleoperated intervention-and-rollback; (2) convert these sparse trajectory-level corrections into dense per-state preference tuples via Smooth Interpolation; (3) optimize the policy with the RPRO loss on a mixed batch of new pairs, historical pairs, and SFT data (Fig. 6). The previous round’s policy serves as the reference policy πref\pi_{\text{ref}} in the next round.
items.zh: FlowPRO在SFT预训练的HyVLA-0.5基础策略之上进行迭代离线RL循环（图5）。每一轮包含三个步骤：（1）通过遥操作干预与回滚收集机器人上的偏好对；（2）通过平滑插值将这些稀疏的轨迹级修正转换为密集的每状态偏好元组；（3）在由新对、历史对和SFT数据组成的混合批次上使用RPRO损失优化策略（图6）。上一轮的策略作为下一轮中的参考策略π_ref。

Given a state s=(o,l)s=(o,l) with visual observations oo and a language instruction ll, a velocity field vθ​(at,t∣s)v_{\theta}(a_{t},t\mid s) transports Gaussian noise ϵ∼𝒩⁡(0,I)\epsilon\sim\mathcal{N}(0,I) to an action chunk aa. This transport follows the linear interpolant at=(1−t)​ϵ+t​aa_{t}=(1-t)\epsilon+ta over flow time t∈[0,1]t\in[0,1], with conditional velocity u⁡(at∣a):=a−ϵu(a_{t}\mid a):=a-\epsilon. Following Flow-DPO [24], we adopt the per-sample flow-matching regression loss as a tractable surrogate for the negative log-likelihood,

items.zh: 这产生了RPRO使用的隐式奖励代理，

items.en: where ℓref\ell_{\text{ref}} and ℓθ\ell_{\theta} denote the flow-matching losses under the reference and current policies. Substituting Eq. (7) into the PRO pairwise objective [14] gives the flow-matching-adapted PRO loss,

To preserve base-policy performance and reinforce direct regression toward awa^{w}, we combine ℒPRO\mathcal{L}_{\text{PRO}} with a supervised term:

A useful side-property of Eq. (8) is contrastive gradient cancellation: when aw=ala^{w}=a^{l}, ∇θℒcon=𝟎

items.capEn: Figure 6: RPRO optimization. The learnable policy πθ\pi_{\theta} and frozen reference πref\pi_{\text{ref}} predict actions aθa^{\theta} and arefa^{\text{ref}} for the same state. The objective pulls aθa^{\theta} toward the preferred action awa^{w} (rw↑r^{w}\!\uparrow) and pushes it from the dispreferred ala^{l} (rl↓r^{l}\!\downarrow). A proximal regularizer (blue dashed) anchors both reward branches to πref\pi_{\text{ref}}, preventing reward hacking. Batches mix 𝒟prefk\mathcal{D}_{\text{pref}}^{k}, 𝒟pref<k\mathcal{D}_{\text{pref}}^{<k}, and 𝒟SFT\mathcal{D}_{\text{SFT}}.

items.en: Data collection: intervention-and-rollback. We collect preference trajectory pairs (τw,τl)(\tau^{w},\tau^{l}) via a teleoperated intervention-and-rollback pipeline (Fig. 5). During rollouts of the current policy, the operator intervenes whenever an erroneous or dangerous action is observed. The system then (1) rewinds to an earlier state st−Δs_{t-\Delta} with operator-chosen horizon Δ\Delta and records the executed segment as the negative trajectory τl\tau^{l}; (2) retrieves the observation at t−Δt-\Delta as a visual reference in case the environment has changed and the physical scene needs to be reset; and (3) records the operator’s corrective demonstration from st−Δs_{t-\Delta} as the positive trajectory τw\tau^{w}. A single operator action thus yields a naturally paired (τw,τl)(\tau^{w},\tau^{l}) sharing the same initial state. Varying Δ\Delta across interventions diversifies the per-pair starting state without recording separate positive and negative rollouts.
items.zh: 数据收集：干预与回滚。我们通过远程操作的干预与回滚流程（图5）收集偏好轨迹对(τw,τl)。在当前策略的 rollout 过程中，操作员在观察到错误或危险动作时进行干预。系统随后(1)回退到较早的状态st-Δ（Δ由操作员选择），并将已执行片段记录为负轨迹τl；(2)检索t-Δ时刻的观测作为视觉参考，以防环境发生变化需要重置物理场景；(3)记录操作员从st-Δ开始的纠正演示作为正轨迹τw。一次操作员动作即可产生自然配对的(τw,τl)，共享相同的初始状态。跨干预变化Δ可多样化每对起始状态，而无需分别记录正负 rollout。

items.en: Smooth Interpolation and batch mixing. Because τw\tau^{w} and τl\tau^{l} diverge after st−Δs_{t-\Delta}, each subsequent state belongs to only one trajectory. To produce dense per-state tuples (s,aw,al)(s,a^{w},a^{l}) required by Eq. (8), we synthesize the missing counterpart with a Smooth Interpolation procedure (Fig. 5). For a state MM on τl\tau^{l}, we locate its closest point M′M^{\prime} on τw\tau^{w} under a weighted distance metric. We then construct a synthetic positive action chunk that bridges from MM to a transition point JJ on τw\tau^{w} via a cubic Bézier for positions, Slerp for orientations, and linear interpolation for the gripper. The chunk then follows τw\tau^{w} until it ends at N′N^{\prime}, while the negative action is simply the next HH steps along τl\tau^{l}. For states already on τw\tau^{w} or in 𝒟SFT\mathcal{D}_{\text{SFT}}, we set aw=ala^{w}=a^{l}. The contrastive gradient cancellation above makes these samples act as regularized SFT samples. Across iterations, we keep the round-kk pairs 𝒟prefk\mathcal{D}_{\text{pref}}^{k}, the historical pool 𝒟pref<k=⋃j<k𝒟prefj\mathcal{D}_{\text{pref}}^{<k}\!=\!\bigcup_{j<k}\mathcal{D}_{\text{pref}}^{j}, and 𝒟SFT\mathcal{D}_{\text{SFT}} in separate buffers. We mix mini-batches at fixed proportions: 80%/20%80\%/20\% for k=1k{=}1 (𝒟prefk/𝒟SFT\mathcal{D}_{\text{pref}}^{k}/\mathcal{D}_{\text{SFT}}) and 70%/15%/15%70\%/15\%/15\% for k≥2k{\geq}2 (𝒟prefk/𝒟pref<k/𝒟SFT\mathcal{D}_{\text{pref}}^{k}/\mathcal{D}_{\text{pref}}^{<k}/\mathcal{D}_{\text{SFT}}). This schedule up-weights the newest, most informative failure states, replays previously corrected ones to prevent regression, and retains a non-trivial SFT share to anchor base capabilities.
items.zh: 平滑插值与批次混合。由于τw和τl在st-Δ之后分叉，每个后续状态仅属于一条轨迹。为生成式(8)所需的密集逐状态元组(s,aw,al)，我们通过平滑插值程序（图5）合成缺失的对应项。对于τl上的状态M，我们在加权距离度量下找到其在τw上的最近点M'。然后构建一个合成正动作块，通过位置的三次贝塞尔、方向的Slerp和夹爪的线性插值，从M桥接到τw上的过渡点J。该块随后沿τw直到N'结束，而负动作仅为沿τl的下H步。对于已在τw或DSFT上的状态，我们设aw=al。上述对比梯度取消使这些样本充当正则化SFT样本。跨迭代，我们将第k轮配对Dprefk、历史池Dpref<k=∪j<kDprefj和DSFT保存在独立缓冲区中。我们按固定比例混合小批量：k=1时为80%/20%（Dprefk/DSFT），k≥2时为70%/15%/15%（Dprefk/Dpref<k/DSFT）。此调度加重了最新、信息量最大的失败状态，重放先前纠正的状态以防止退化，并保留非平凡的SFT份额以锚定基础能力。

items.en: Experimental validation of FlowPRO on four real-robot bimanual tasks (Bottle, Cap, USB, Zip) is reported in 6.3 together with the rest of the empirical evaluation.
items.zh: FlowPRO在四个真实机器人双臂任务（瓶子、瓶盖、USB、拉链）上的实验验证在6.3节与其余实证评估一起报告。

items.en: Deployment mainly addresses three runtime issues: mapping end-effector delta chunks to heterogeneous robot platforms, serving VLA predictions at the robot control rate, and stitching independently predicted chunks into smooth motion. We handle them with three lightweight components: a platform mapper that keeps the learned action interface unchanged across embodiments (Sec. 5.1); an asynchronous inference–execution loop that overlaps backbone forward passes with servo execution (Sec. 5.2); and a latency-aware cubic-Bézier stitcher that removes stale prefixes and enforces smooth chunk transitions (Sec. 5.3). The same deployment stack is used across all real-robot evaluations.
items.zh: 部署主要解决三个运行时问题：将末端执行器增量块映射到异构机器人平台、以机器人控制速率提供VLA预测、以及将独立预测的块拼接成平滑运动。我们通过三个轻量级组件处理这些问题：平台映射器，保持学习动作接口跨具身不变（第5.1节）；异步推理-执行循环，将骨干网络前向传递与伺服执行重叠（第5.2节）；以及延迟感知的三次贝塞尔拼接器，移除过时前缀并强制平滑块过渡（第5.3节）。相同的部署栈用于所有真实机器人评估。

items.en: The role of platform mapping is to preserve the robot-agnostic contract established by the delta-chunk representation. The policy outputs a 20-dimensional dual-arm action chunk (10 dimensions per end-effector: a 3-D Cartesian translation and a 6-D rotation — the first two rows of an S​O​(3)SO(3) rotation matrix — both expressed relative to the end-effector pose at the start of the chunk, together with a 1-D gripper opening command). Embodiment-specific kinematics are deferred to deployment, where the relative S​E​(3)SE(3) prediction is composed with the initial end-effector pose to recover absolute world-frame targets and inverse kinematics (IK) is then solved on the target robot to produce joint commands.
items.zh: 平台映射的作用是保持由增量块表示建立的机器人无关契约。策略输出一个20维双臂动作块（每个末端执行器10维：3维笛卡尔平移和6维旋转——SO(3)旋转矩阵的前两行——均相对于块起始时的末端执行器位姿表示，加上1维夹爪开合命令）。具身特定运动学推迟到部署阶段，其中相对SE(3)预测与初始末端执行器位姿组合以恢复绝对世界帧目标，然后在目标机器人上求解逆运动学（IK）以产生关节命令。

items.en: For intra-embodiment deployment (Track A), the world frame remains the same in deployment and data collection. For cross-embodiment deployment (Track B), data collection and deployment use different embodiments, so we instantiate mappings for two embodiment types: fixed-base arms and the floating-base humanoid. In the equations below, TBA{}^{A}T_{B} denotes the pose of frame BB in frame AA; WW, GtG_{t}, Gt+kG_{t+k}, and CC are the world, current gripper, predicted future gripper k steps further, and the chassis frame.
items.zh: 对于具身内部署（赛道A），世界帧在部署和数据收集时相同。对于跨具身部署（赛道B），数据收集和部署使用不同具身，因此我们为两种具身类型实例化映射：固定基座臂和浮动基座人形机器人。在以下方程中，TBA表示帧B在帧A中的位姿；W、Gt、Gt+k和C分别是世界、当前夹爪、预测的未来第k步夹爪和底盘帧。

The additional 2424 head/torso dimensions (1212 each: 33 position ++ 99 rotation) are set by this heuristic rather than predicted by the policy. This keeps the learned action interface unchanged across Track A intra-embodiment deployment and Track B cross-embodiment deployment.
items.zh: 其中TCW是计算后缓存的常数变换。额外的24个头/躯干维度（各12维：3位置+9旋转）由此启发式设置，而非由策略预测。这使学习动作接口在赛道A具身内部署和赛道B跨具身部署之间保持不变。

items.en: A high-capacity VLA policy runs slower than the robot servo loop, so synchronous execution would leave the robot idle between forward passes. We therefore decouple inference from command dispatch using a producer–consumer runtime with a thread-safe action buffer ℬ\mathcal{B} (Fig. 7). The inference thread queries the policy from the latest observation and overwrites ℬ\mathcal{B} with a smoothed action sequence, while the execution thread pops commands from ℬ\mathcal{B} at the control frequency and records recent poses for tangent estimation. Overlapping these two loops hides much of the backbone latency behind continuous execution.
items.zh: 高容量VLA策略运行速度慢于机器人伺服循环，因此同步执行会使机器人在前向传递之间空闲。因此，我们使用生产者-消费者运行时将推理与命令分发解耦，该运行时具有线程安全的动作缓冲区B（图7）。推理线程从最新观测查询策略并用平滑动作序列覆盖B，而执行线程以控制频率从B弹出命令并记录最近位姿用于切线估计。重叠这两个循环将大部分骨干网络延迟隐藏在连续执行之后。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Asynchronous execution timeline. Policy inference, Bézier smoothing, buffer overwrite, and servo-rate action execution are overlapped; executed actions are recorded in ℋ\mathcal{H} to estimate tangents for the next chunk stitch.
items.capZh: 图7：异步执行时间线。策略推理、贝塞尔平滑、缓冲区覆盖和伺服速率动作执行重叠；执行的动作记录在H中以估计下一个块拼接的切线。

full.secZh: 5.3 延迟感知贝塞尔块拼接

items.en: Chunk stitching is critical in asynchronous execution: delayed chunks must be reconnected to the robot’s current state without introducing motion discontinuities. We use a cubic Bézier segment to form a compact C1C^{1}-continuous connector with controllable endpoint positions and tangents.
items.zh: 块拼接在异步执行中至关重要：延迟的块必须重新连接到机器人当前状态，而不引入运动不连续性。我们使用三次贝塞尔段形成紧凑的C1连续连接器，具有可控的端点位置和切线。

items.en: The first design choice is to select the connection point between the Bézier connector and the retained chunk. We set γ\gamma as a lightweight deployment hyperparameter, chosen according to hardware response such as acceleration limits and servo rate. A smaller γ\gamma selects an earlier point in the retained chunk and preserves more policy-predicted actions, but leaves less room to correct the delayed boundary. A larger γ\gamma provides a smoother landing target but skips more predicted actions. We clip the resulting index away from both ends so that the future tangent can be estimated from neighboring waypoints.
items.zh: 第一个设计选择是选择贝塞尔连接器与保留块之间的连接点。我们将γ设置为轻量级部署超参数，根据硬件响应（如加速度限制和伺服速率）选择。较小的γ选择保留块中较早的点并保留更多策略预测的动作，但为纠正延迟边界留出较少空间。较大的γ提供更平滑的着陆目标，但跳过更多预测动作。我们将结果索引从两端裁剪，以便未来切线可以从邻近路径点估计。

items.en: The control points are chosen with the same intuition. The Bézier curve should leave the robot’s current trajectory in the direction it was already moving, and enter the future chunk in the direction that the policy predicts next. We therefore place the two inner control points along the historical motion direction and the local direction of the future chunk, with their distance scaled by the gap between the current robot state and the reconnection point. This gives a smooth transition without introducing an additional learned controller.
items.zh: 控制点选择具有相同直觉。贝塞尔曲线应沿机器人当前运动方向离开当前轨迹，并沿策略预测的下一个方向进入未来块。因此，我们将两个内部控制点沿历史运动方向和未来块的局部方向放置，其距离按当前机器人状态与重新连接点之间的间隙缩放。这提供了平滑过渡，而无需引入额外的学习控制器。
