items.en: The empirical validation addresses two parallel questions: how well HyVLA-0.5 performs after standard downstream supervised fine-tuning in simulation and on real hardware (Secs. 6.1 and 6.2), and how much FlowPRO post-training further improves a deployed policy (Sec. 6.3).
items.zh: 实证验证解决了两个并行问题：HyVLA-0.5 在标准下游监督微调后在仿真和真实硬件上的表现（第 6.1 和 6.2 节），以及 FlowPRO 后训练进一步改进已部署策略的程度（第 6.3 节）。

items.en: For real hardware, we organize the SFT evaluation into two deployment tracks: Track A fine-tunes and evaluates on the same tele-operated robot platform, while Track B fine-tunes only on UMI demonstrations and deploys on morphologically different robots without target-robot teleoperation. We evaluate four Track-A tasks and two Track-B tasks. Foundational baselines π0\pi_{0} and π0.5\pi_{0.5} are identically parameterized and trained with matched data and iteration budgets.
items.zh: 对于真实硬件，我们将 SFT 评估组织为两个部署轨道：轨道 A 在相同的遥操作机器人平台上微调和评估，而轨道 B 仅在 UMI 演示上微调，并在形态不同的机器人上部署，无需目标机器人遥操作。我们评估了四个轨道 A 任务和两个轨道 B 任务。基础基线 π₀ 和 π₀.₅ 具有相同的参数化，并使用匹配的数据和迭代预算进行训练。

items.en: On RoboTwin 2.0 [9], we report task success rates averaged over 100100 stochastic rollouts per task and then over the full 5050-task suite. Results are evaluated under both Clean and Randomized settings, with aggregate comparisons and ablations shown in Table 1; the complete per-task breakdown is deferred to Appendix A (Table 3).
items.zh: 在 RoboTwin 2.0 [9] 上，我们报告了每个任务在 100 次随机 rollout 上的平均成功率，然后在整个 50 个任务套件上取平均。结果在干净和随机设置下进行评估，汇总比较和消融实验见表 1；完整的逐任务分解见附录 A（表 3）。

items.en: Baselines and main results. We benchmark against eight contemporary VLA systems—π0\pi_{0} [7], π0.5\pi_{0.5} [32], ABot-M0 [50], LingBot-VLA [46], starVLA [39], Motus [5], JoyAI-RA [54], and Qwen-VLA [43]—using each method’s officially reported success rates under the same Clean and Randomized protocol. As shown in the upper block of Table 1, HyVLA-0.5 attains the best success rate in both settings, reaching 90.9%90.9\% on Clean and 90.1%90.1\% on Randomized. It outperforms π0\pi_{0} by 25.025.0 points on Clean (vs. 65.9%65.9\%) and by 31.731.7 points on Randomized (vs. 58.4%58.4\%), and remains clearly ahead of π0.5\pi_{0.5} by 8.28.2 and 13.313.3 points (vs. 82.7%82.7\% and 76.8%76.8\%). Even against the strongest competing method, JoyAI-RA, HyVLA-0.5 still leads by 0.40.4 and 0.80.8 points (vs. 90.5%90.5\% and 89.3%89.3\%).
items.zh: 基线和主要结果。我们与八个当代 VLA 系统——π₀ [7]、π₀.₅ [32]、ABot-M0 [50]、LingBot-VLA [46]、starVLA [39]、Motus [5]、JoyAI-RA [54] 和 Qwen-VLA [43]——进行基准测试，使用每种方法在相同干净和随机协议下官方报告的成功率。如表 1 上部所示，HyVLA-0.5 在两种设置下均达到最佳成功率，干净设置为 90.9%，随机设置为 90.1%。它在干净设置上比 π₀（65.9%）高出 25.0 个百分点，在随机设置上比 π₀（58.4%）高出 31.7 个百分点，并且明显领先于 π₀.₅（82.7% 和 76.8%），分别高出 8.2 和 13.3 个百分点。即使与最强竞争方法 JoyAI-RA（90.5% 和 89.3%）相比，HyVLA-0.5 仍领先 0.4 和 0.8 个百分点。

items.en: Ablation. The lower block of Table 1 conducts a removal-based ablation starting from the full HyVLA-0.5 model. Removing the compact memory encoder reduces performance from 90.9%90.9\% / 90.1%90.1\% to 88.8%88.8\% / 88.6%88.6\% on Clean / Randomized; further removing the large-scale UMI pre-training stage lowers the scores to 88.1%88.1\% / 87.9%87.9\%. Together, these ablations show that both UMI pre-training and short-horizon visual memory contribute consistent gains. Although the egocentric real-world UMI corpus is visually distant from the synthetic RoboTwin 2.0 renderings, UMI pre-training still provides a modest gain in simulation. The limited magnitude is expected, given the large gaps in task distribution, action trajectories, and visual appearance. In contrast, Sec. 6.2 shows its significant benefit on real-robot tasks, where the domain gap to UMI demonstrations is smaller.
items.zh: 消融实验。表 1 的下部从完整的 HyVLA-0.5 模型开始进行基于移除的消融实验。移除紧凑记忆编码器后，性能从干净/随机设置的 90.9%/90.1% 下降到 88.8%/88.6%；进一步移除大规模 UMI 预训练阶段后，分数降至 88.1%/87.9%。这些消融实验共同表明，UMI 预训练和短程视觉记忆都带来了持续的增益。尽管以自我为中心的真实世界 UMI 语料库在视觉上与合成的 RoboTwin 2.0 渲染图存在差异，但 UMI 预训练在仿真中仍提供了适度的增益。考虑到任务分布、动作轨迹和视觉外观的巨大差距，这种有限的幅度是预期的。相比之下，第 6.2 节显示了它在真实机器人任务上的显著优势，其中与 UMI 演示的领域差距较小。

items.en: We evaluate HyVLA-0.5 on real-robot bimanual manipulation through the two deployment tracks introduced above, spanning three platforms and six benchmark tasks, plus a qualitative force-discrimination task on a Unitree G1. All per-task snapshots and success rates are reported in Figure 9. Track A tests intra-embodiment fine-tuning, while Track B probes whether UMI-only post-training can transfer task semantics across embodiments.
items.zh: 我们通过上述两个部署轨道在真实机器人双臂操作上评估 HyVLA-0.5，涵盖三个平台和六个基准任务，以及在 Unitree G1 上的一个定性力判别任务。所有逐任务快照和成功率见图 9。轨道 A 测试了具身内微调，而轨道 B 探究了仅 UMI 的后训练能否跨具身传递任务语义。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Real-robot evaluation on six bimanual manipulation tasks. Left panel: Snapshots of representative task executions captured during rollout. Right panel: Per-task success rates (%) after supervised fine-tuning on tele-operated or UMI demonstrations.
items.capZh: 图 9：六个双臂操作任务的真实机器人评估。左面板：rollout 期间捕获的代表性任务执行快照。右面板：在遥操作或 UMI 演示上监督微调后的逐任务成功率（%）。

items.en: Track A — Intra-Embodiment Fine-Tuning (Dobot X-Trainer). Data are collected via tele-operation on a Dobot X-Trainer and the same platform is used for evaluation. We benchmark four bimanual tasks: Insert Bottles, where the robot grasps two cylindrical bottles and inserts each into a dedicated holder under tight geometric tolerances; Fold and Store Glasses, where it picks up a pair of eyeglasses, folds the temples inward through coordinated bimanual motion, and places them into a protective case; Set the Table, where it arranges a plate, a fork, and a knife at canonical positions on a dining surface, requiring long-horizon spatial planning and precise 6-DoF placement; and Zip Up the Pen Case, where it opens the zipper, inserts a pen, and closes the zipper along the full track under deformable-object dynamics.
items.zh: 轨道 A——具身内微调（Dobot X-Trainer）。数据通过 Dobot X-Trainer 上的遥操作收集，并使用同一平台进行评估。我们基准测试了四个双臂任务：插入瓶子，机器人抓取两个圆柱形瓶子并将每个插入专用支架，要求严格的几何公差；折叠并存放眼镜，机器人通过协调的双臂运动拿起一副眼镜，向内折叠镜腿，并将其放入保护盒；摆桌子，机器人将盘子、叉子和刀摆放在餐桌上的标准位置，需要长程空间规划和精确的 6 自由度放置；以及拉上笔袋拉链，机器人在可变形物体动力学下打开拉链、插入笔并沿整个轨道拉上拉链。

items.en: Effect of UMI Pre-training on Track-A Tasks. The per-task results in Figure 9 reveal a consistent pattern on the precision-critical tasks. For Fold and Store Glasses and Zip Up the Pen Case, success hinges on a few decisive sub-steps rather than on the trajectory as a whole, e.g. folding the temples without slipping, or pinching the zipper slider before pulling. Without Hy-UMI-10K pre-training, the policy is visibly less accurate at exactly these moments, where sub-centimetre positioning and stable bimanual force coupling are required. The resulting local errors then propagate downstream and dominate the failure modes. Pre-training reverses this pattern: predictions sharpen at the same critical moments, end-to-end success rates rise accordingly, and coarser segments of the trajectory remain essentially unchanged. This task-level evidence corroborates the simulation ablation in Section 6.1. It suggests that the principal value of large-scale, high-precision UMI pre-training is to sharpen the action distribution at the precision-critical bottlenecks of downstream manipulation, and that this benefit transfers from human demonstrations to real-robot post-training.
items.zh: UMI 预训练对轨道 A 任务的影响。图 9 中的逐任务结果揭示了精度关键任务上的一致模式。对于折叠并存放眼镜和拉上笔袋拉链，成功取决于几个关键子步骤，而不是整个轨迹，例如折叠镜腿而不滑落，或在拉动前捏住拉链滑块。没有 Hy-UMI-10K 预训练，策略在这些需要亚厘米级定位和稳定双臂力耦合的时刻明显不够精确。由此产生的局部误差随后向下游传播并主导失败模式。预训练扭转了这种模式：在相同的关键时刻，预测变得更加精确，端到端成功率相应提高，而轨迹的较粗糙部分基本保持不变。这种任务级证据证实了第 6.1 节中的仿真消融实验。这表明大规模、高精度 UMI 预训练的主要价值在于锐化下游操作中精度关键瓶颈处的动作分布，并且这种益处从人类演示转移到真实机器人后训练。

items.en: Track B — Cross-Embodiment Transfer (JAKA K1, Astribot S1). For each target robot, we post-train the UMI pre-trained checkpoint on task-specific UMI demonstrations only—without any target-robot teleoperation—and deploy the resulting policy on the corresponding robot. We benchmark two tasks: Put Away the Accessory on JAKA K1, where the robot picks up a sub-centimetre hair tie and places it into the centre cell of a compartment box whose cell size nearly matches the tie’s diameter; and Clean Up the Table on Astribot S1, where the humanoid locates scattered paper cups on a tabletop and deposits them sequentially into a waste bin.
items.zh: 轨道 B——跨具身迁移（JAKA K1, Astribot S1）。对于每个目标机器人，我们仅在特定任务的 UMI 演示上对 UMI 预训练检查点进行后训练——无需任何目标机器人遥操作——并在相应机器人上部署所得策略。我们基准测试了两个任务：在 JAKA K1 上收起配件，机器人拿起一个亚厘米级的发圈并将其放入一个隔间盒的中心单元格中，该单元格尺寸几乎与发圈直径匹配；在 Astribot S1 上清理桌面，人形机器人定位桌面上散落的纸杯并将其依次放入垃圾桶。

items.en: Effect of UMI Pre-training on Track-B Tasks. Track B isolates the contribution of UMI pre-training to cross-embodiment deployment: since no target-robot data is ever seen during fine-tuning, any gain over an identically configured baseline must come from the prior learned during pre-training. Figure 9 shows that this gain is substantial on both robots: HyVLA-0.5 achieves markedly higher success rates than π0\pi_{0} and π0.5\pi_{0.5} on Put Away the Accessory and Clean Up the Table, despite all three policies being post-trained on the same UMI data. The improvement indicates that large-scale, high-fidelity UMI pre-training equips the model with embodiment-agnostic action priors that survive a deployment shift to morphologically unseen robots, and that these priors make the small UMI fine-tuning set sufficient on its own to recover deployable performance on a new platform.
items.zh: UMI 预训练对轨道 B 任务的影响。轨道 B 隔离了 UMI 预训练对跨具身部署的贡献：由于微调期间从未见过目标机器人数据，因此与相同配置基线相比的任何增益都必须来自预训练期间学到的先验。图 9 显示，这种增益在两个机器人上都很显著：尽管所有三个策略都在相同的 UMI 数据上进行了后训练，但 HyVLA-0.5 在收起配件和清理桌面任务上实现了比 π₀ 和 π₀.₅ 明显更高的成功率。这一改进表明，大规模、高保真度的 UMI 预训练使模型具备了与具身无关的动作先验，这些先验能够承受向形态未知机器人的部署迁移，并且这些先验使得少量 UMI 微调集本身就足以在新平台上恢复可部署的性能。

items.en: Force-Modality Validation (Unitree G1). Because our handheld UMI gripper records tip force signals during demonstration collection, the resulting data directly contains the physical cues needed for force-aware, and potentially force-controlled, manipulation. We show this capability on a Unitree G1 equipped with our end effector, where the policy performs a force-discrimination task: it sequentially grasps two boxes and places the lighter one into a front basket. For this task, we augment the action expert with two lightweight TCN encoders [18] and an MLP projector, which together encode a 5050-step F/T window for each hand (∼\sim2M added parameters). The augmented policy is then post-trained on a small set of UMI demonstrations recorded with the workstation’s tip force/torque signals (Sec. 3.1). Since the lighter-object position is randomized across trials, spatial memory alone cannot solve the task; the policy must compare the grasp-phase force profiles before deciding which box to place. HyVLA-0.5 reliably selects the lighter box across trials (Fig. 10), showing that the tactile signals captured by the UMI workstation provide actionable non-visual cues for downstream policy learning.
items.zh: 力模态验证（Unitree G1）。由于我们的手持 UMI 夹爪在演示收集期间记录尖端力信号，因此所得数据直接包含力感知（以及潜在的力控制）操作所需的物理线索。我们在配备我们末端执行器的 Unitree G1 上展示了这种能力，其中策略执行了一个力判别任务：它依次抓取两个盒子，并将较轻的一个放入前篮。对于此任务，我们为动作专家增加了两个轻量级 TCN 编码器 [18] 和一个 MLP 投影器，它们共同为每只手编码一个 50 步的 F/T 窗口（约 2M 新增参数）。然后，增强策略在记录有工作站尖端力/扭矩信号的一小组 UMI 演示（第 3.1 节）上进行后训练。由于较轻物体的位置在试验中是随机的，仅靠空间记忆无法解决该任务；策略必须在决定放置哪个盒子之前比较抓取阶段的力分布。HyVLA-0.5 在多次试验中可靠地选择了较轻的盒子（图 10），表明 UMI 工作站捕获的触觉信号为下游策略学习提供了可操作的非视觉线索。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Force-guided object discrimination on a Unitree G1. The robot sequentially grasps two boxes of differing mass and places the lighter one into the front basket, confirming that the in-house UMI workstation captures actionable tactile information.
items.capZh: 图 10：Unitree G1 上的力引导物体判别。机器人依次抓取两个质量不同的盒子，并将较轻的一个放入前篮，证实了内部 UMI 工作站捕获了可操作的触觉信息。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Additional fine-grained real-robot tasks for FlowPRO post-training. Beyond Insert Bottles (Bottle, sub-cm insertion) and Zip Up the Pen Case, which are shown in Fig. 9, we further evaluate FlowPRO on two fine-grained tasks: USB insertion (USB, sub-mm precision) and Pen-Cap Assembly (Cap, in-air bimanual coordination). This figure illustrates these two additional tasks.
items.capZh: 图 11：用于 FlowPRO 后训练的其他细粒度真实机器人任务。除了图 9 中所示的插入瓶子（瓶子，亚厘米插入）和拉上笔袋拉链外，我们还在两个细粒度任务上评估了 FlowPRO：USB 插入（USB，亚毫米精度）和笔帽组装（帽，空中双臂协调）。此图说明了这两个额外任务。

items.en: Setup. All FlowPRO experiments are conducted on a Dobot X-Trainer bimanual platform. We evaluate on four long-horizon bimanual tasks (Fig. 11): Bottle, Cap, USB, and Zip. Starting from the same HyVLA-0.5 SFT checkpoint πref\pi_{\text{ref}}, every method runs K=3K{=}3 rounds of iterative post-training under an identical data-collection budget. Each entry in Table 2 is averaged over 33 training seeds; per-seed success rate (SR) is computed from n=100n{=}100 rollouts with randomized initial placements, and completion time (CT) is averaged over the same rollouts.
items.zh: 设置。所有 FlowPRO 实验均在 Dobot X-Trainer 双臂平台上进行。我们评估了四个长程双臂任务（图 11）：瓶子、帽、USB 和拉链。从相同的 HyVLA-0.5 SFT 检查点 π_ref 开始，每种方法在相同的数据收集预算下运行 K=3 轮迭代后训练。表 2 中的每个条目在 3 个训练种子上取平均；每种子成功率（SR）从 n=100 次随机初始放置的 rollout 中计算，完成时间（CT）在相同的 rollout 上取平均。

items.en: Baselines. We compare RPRO against two representative comparators that cover both regimes of the design space: DAgger [37] (positive-only dataset aggregation) and π0.6\pi_{0.6}* [31] (advantage-conditioned regression that uses the same positive-and-negative pairs as RPRO but injects the preference signal as a conditioning token rather than through a contrastive loss). All methods share the same HyVLA-0.5 SFT backbone and the same iterative data-collection protocol.
items.zh: 基线。我们将 RPRO 与两个覆盖设计空间两个区域的代表性比较方法进行比较：DAgger [37]（仅正样本数据集聚合）和 π₀.₆* [31]（优势条件回归，使用与 RPRO 相同的正负样本对，但通过条件标记而非对比损失注入偏好信号）。所有方法共享相同的 HyVLA-0.5 SFT 主干和相同的迭代数据收集协议。

items.en: Results. Table 2 and Fig. 12 summarize the comparison. RPRO vs. DAgger. DAgger relies on positive samples only, while RPRO additionally exploits negative trajectories through a contrastive loss; the resulting per-state push-away gradient from ala^{l} pulls the policy back from nearby failure modes, yielding a consistent gain across all four tasks. RPRO vs. π0.6\pi_{0.6}*. On identical preference data, RPRO still outperforms the advantage-conditioned π0.6\pi_{0.6}* baseline. π0.6\pi_{0.6}* relies on the model to discover the “improved”/“unimproved” partition from a single conditioning token under a pure regression objective—an indirect pressure that can be diluted by the rest of the VLM context—whereas RPRO (4.2) injects the preference signal directly into the action-generation loss, pushing πθ\pi_{\theta} toward awa^{w} and away from ala^{l} per state and per chunk. Across all four tasks, RPRO attains the highest SR with the shortest CT, indicating both more reliable and more efficient task execution.
items.zh: 结果。表 2 和图 12 总结了比较结果。RPRO 与 DAgger：DAgger 仅依赖正样本，而 RPRO 通过对比损失额外利用负轨迹；由此产生的来自 a^l 的每状态推开梯度将策略从附近的失败模式拉回，在所有四个任务上产生一致的增益。RPRO 与 π₀.₆*：在相同的偏好数据上，RPRO 仍然优于优势条件回归的 π₀.₆* 基线。π₀.₆* 依赖于模型从单个条件标记中在纯回归目标下发现“改进”/“未改进”的划分——这是一种间接压力，可能被 VLM 上下文的其余部分稀释——而 RPRO（4.2）直接将偏好信号注入动作生成损失，推动 π_θ 朝向 a^w 并远离 a^l，每状态每块。在所有四个任务上，RPRO 实现了最高的 SR 和最短的 CT，表明任务执行更可靠且更高效。

items.capEn: Figure 12: Per-iteration success rate on the four real-robot tasks with HyVLA-0.5 as the base policy. Iteration 00 corresponds to the shared SFT checkpoint; iterations 11–33 correspond to successive rounds of post-training. RPRO consistently dominates DAgger and π0.6\pi_{0.6}* throughout the iterative process.
items.capZh: 图12：以HyVLA-0.5为基础策略，在四个真实机器人任务上的每轮迭代成功率。迭代00对应共享的SFT检查点；迭代11–33对应后训练的连续轮次。RPRO在整个迭代过程中始终优于DAgger和π0.6*。

items.en: Early VLAs abstracted robotic control into discrete tokens processed by autoregressive heads atop pre-trained VLMs, as exemplified by RT-2 [8] and OpenVLA [17]. While effectively transferring semantic priors, this discretisation inherently constrained control frequency and spatial precision. π0\pi_{0} [7] supplanted discrete action spaces with flow-matching velocity fields, restoring continuous, high-frequency (e.g., 5050 Hz) execution capabilities. Concurrently, DeepMind introduced Gemini Robotics [42], bringing Gemini-level reasoning to physical control, and NVIDIA released GR00T N1 [6], an open foundation model for generalist humanoid control pre-trained on teleoperation, human video, and synthetic data. π0.5\pi_{0.5} [32] subsequently advanced the flow-matching paradigm with open-world generalization, while Gemini Robotics 1.5 [1] extended the approach with advanced embodied reasoning and cross-embodiment motion transfer. LingBot-VLA [46] takes a pragmatic approach, scaling to 20 K hours of real-world dual-arm data across 100 tasks with a throughput-optimised open-source codebase. Unlike autoregressive VLAs, HyVLA-0.5 operates entirely within a continuous flow-matching paradigm; unlike π0\pi_{0} and π0.5\pi_{0.5}, it adopts an MoT-based embodied-native backbone, relies on a 10 K-hour UMI pre-training corpus, and features a specialised deployment protocol for zero-shot cross-embodiment transfer.
items.zh: 早期的VLA将机器人控制抽象为离散词元，由预训练VLM之上的自回归头处理，如RT-2 [8]和OpenVLA [17]所示。虽然有效迁移了语义先验，但这种离散化固有地限制了控制频率和空间精度。π0 [7]用流匹配速度场取代了离散动作空间，恢复了连续、高频（例如50 Hz）的执行能力。同时，DeepMind推出了Gemini Robotics [42]，将Gemini级别的推理引入物理控制，NVIDIA发布了GR00T N1 [6]，这是一个面向通用人形机器人控制的开放基础模型，在遥操作、人类视频和合成数据上进行了预训练。π0.5 [32]随后通过开放世界泛化推进了流匹配范式，而Gemini Robotics 1.5 [1]通过高级具身推理和跨本体运动迁移扩展了该方法。LingBot-VLA [46]采取务实方法，通过吞吐量优化的开源代码库，将规模扩展到100个任务上的20K小时真实世界双臂数据。与自回归VLA不同，HyVLA-0.5完全在连续流匹配范式内运行；与π0和π0.5不同，它采用基于MoT的具身原生骨干，依赖10K小时的UMI预训练语料库，并具有用于零样本跨本体迁移的专门部署协议。

items.en: The majority of contemporary VLAs depend on general-purpose vision-language models such as PaliGemma [4] or Qwen-VL [2]. Recently, domain-specific backbones such as RoboBrain [40], RynnBrain [11], and Hy-Embodied-0.5 [44] have emerged to better address the fine-grained visual acuity required for manipulation. The internal Hy-Embodied report introduced a prototype VLA fine-tuned from 55 k hours of UMI data, achieving promising baseline success rates on X-Trainer tasks [44]. Building strictly upon this foundation, HyVLA-0.5 doubles the UMI scale to 1010 k hours, implements the rel-EE representation to facilitate humanoid deployment, and introduces the FlowPRO RL post-training stage, thereby extending efficacy to unseen platforms including JAKA and Astribot S1.
items.zh: 大多数当代VLA依赖于通用视觉语言模型，如PaliGemma [4]或Qwen-VL [2]。最近，出现了领域特定的骨干网络，如RoboBrain [40]、RynnBrain [11]和Hy-Embodied-0.5 [44]，以更好地解决操作所需的细粒度视觉敏锐度。内部Hy-Embodied报告介绍了一个从55K小时UMI数据微调的原型VLA，在X-Trainer任务上取得了有希望的基线成功率[44]。严格基于此基础，HyVLA-0.5将UMI规模翻倍至1010K小时，实现了rel-EE表示以促进人形机器人部署，并引入了FlowPRO RL后训练阶段，从而将有效性扩展到包括JAKA和Astribot S1在内的未见平台。

items.en: Current multi-embodiment pre-training paradigms, such as TRI’s Large Behaviour Models [3] and the π0.5\pi_{0.5} methodology, primarily leverage aggregated teleoperation datasets (e.g., Open-X-Embodiment [29], DROID [16]). By contrast, the foundational pre-training signal of HyVLA-0.5 is predominantly sourced from human-centric UMI data, optimising the action expert under a singular flow-matching loss.
items.zh: 当前的多本体预训练范式，如TRI的大型行为模型[3]和π0.5方法，主要利用聚合的遥操作数据集（例如Open-X-Embodiment [29]、DROID [16]）。相比之下，HyVLA-0.5的基础预训练信号主要来源于以人为中心的UMI数据，在单一的流匹配损失下优化动作专家。

items.en: The Universal Manipulation Interface (UMI) [10] pioneered the capture of robot-agnostic demonstration data via hand-held gripper rigs. Subsequent efforts, such as DexUMI [48], expanded the morphological applicability of such rigs. Recently, several frameworks have addressed the feasibility of migrating UMI-style hand-held data to humanoid and mobile systems, such as EgoMI [52] (which captures synchronized head-hand tracking for whole-body and active vision manipulation) and HoMMI [49] (which learns whole-body mobile manipulation directly from robot-free egocentric human demonstrations). HyVLA-0.5 scales UMI data to over 10k hours, and demonstrates UMI-based cross-embodiment transfer to a humanoid under a Stage-2 protocol entirely devoid of target-robot teleoperation.
items.zh: 通用操作接口（UMI）[10]开创了通过手持夹爪装置捕获与机器人无关的演示数据的方法。后续工作，如DexUMI [48]，扩展了此类装置的形态适用性。最近，一些框架解决了将UMI式手持数据迁移到人形机器人和移动系统的可行性，例如EgoMI [52]（捕获同步的头手跟踪以实现全身和主动视觉操作）和HoMMI [49]（直接从无机器人的自我中心人类演示学习全身移动操作）。HyVLA-0.5将UMI数据扩展到超过10K小时，并展示了在完全无目标机器人遥操作的阶段2协议下，基于UMI的跨本体迁移到人形机器人。

items.en: Real-robot post-training pipelines for VLA models broadly fall into three families, each with a characteristic limitation that re-emerges in the flow-matching setting. (i) SFT and its interactive extensions—vanilla SFT [7, 17] and DAgger-style human correction [37]—scale to real hardware but only weakly exploit the failure signals from autonomous rollouts: vanilla SFT discards them, while DAgger uses them merely to trigger expert correction rather than as a direct optimization signal. (ii) Reward- or value-based RL [30, 38, 28, 31] requires training a reliable reward, value, or advantage model, which itself becomes a key obstacle for contact-rich manipulation where dense reward signals are difficult to obtain; HIL-SERL [28] and π0.6∗\pi_{0.6}* [31] additionally introduce significant engineering overheads such as advantage values and intricate reward shaping. (iii) Preference-based RL bypasses reward design via preference data: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) [36] operates without critics by optimising likelihood ratios but was originally designed for discrete text, while recent extensions to continuous flow-matching policies, such as Flow-DPO [24] and the trajectory-level GRAPE [55], restore preference learning to flow-based VLAs but inherit the reward-hacking failure mode of plain DPO and dilute the per-state learning signal. Unlike π0.6∗\pi_{0.6}*, our FlowPRO recipe (4) is entirely critic- and reward-free; unlike Flow-DPO and GRAPE, the underlying RPRO loss anchors the implicit reward via a proximal regularizer that explicitly forbids the plain-DPO reward-hacking pathology, and exploits a contrastive-gradient-cancellation property to safely co-train on SFT samples through the same objective.
items.zh: VLA模型的真实机器人后训练流程大致分为三类，每类都有一个在流匹配设置中重新出现的特征局限性。(i) SFT及其交互式扩展——普通SFT [7, 17]和DAgger式人工修正[37]——可扩展到真实硬件，但仅弱利用自主部署中的失败信号：普通SFT丢弃它们，而DAgger仅将其用于触发专家修正，而非作为直接优化信号。(ii) 基于奖励或价值的RL [30, 38, 28, 31]需要训练可靠的奖励、价值或优势模型，这本身成为接触丰富操作的关键障碍，因为难以获得密集奖励信号；HIL-SERL [28]和π0.6* [31]还引入了显著工程开销，如优势值和复杂的奖励塑形。(iii) 基于偏好的RL通过偏好数据绕过奖励设计：直接偏好优化（DPO）[36]通过优化似然比在没有评论家的情况下运行，但最初是为离散文本设计的，而最近扩展到连续流匹配策略的方法，如Flow-DPO [24]和轨迹级GRAPE [55]，将偏好学习恢复为基于流的VLA，但继承了普通DPO的奖励黑客失败模式，并稀释了每个状态的学习信号。与π0.6*不同，我们的FlowPRO配方（4）完全无评论家和奖励；与Flow-DPO和GRAPE不同，底层RPRO损失通过近端正则化器锚定隐式奖励，明确禁止普通DPO的奖励黑客病理，并利用对比梯度抵消属性通过同一目标安全地共同训练SFT样本。

items.en: Action chunking [57] has become the de-facto deployment recipe for VLA policies but introduces intra-chunk jitter, chunk-boundary discontinuities, and idle gaps when the backbone latency exceeds the servo period. Inference-Time RTC [33] introduces a lightweight flow-matching action server that refines coarse action chunks at high frequency, decoupling the slow backbone from fast control; Training-Time RTC [34] further co-trains this refinement module with the policy. VLASH [41] learns an adaptive halting mechanism that determines chunk size based on task complexity, reducing inter-chunk gaps. By contrast, our deployment recipe (5) is training-free and plug-and-play for arbitrary policies, explicitly guarantees C1C^{1} continuity at chunk boundaries via tangent-aligned cubic Bézier curves, and is applicable to both Cartesian and joint-space control.
items.zh: 动作分块[57]已成为VLA策略的事实部署方案，但引入了块内抖动、块边界不连续性以及当骨干延迟超过伺服周期时的空闲间隙。推理时RTC [33]引入了一个轻量级流匹配动作服务器，以高频细化粗动作块，将慢速骨干与快速控制解耦；训练时RTC [34]进一步将此细化模块与策略共同训练。VLASH [41]学习一种自适应暂停机制，根据任务复杂度确定块大小，减少块间间隙。相比之下，我们的部署配方（5）是无训练且即插即用的，适用于任意策略，通过切线对齐的三次贝塞尔曲线明确保证块边界的C1连续性，并适用于笛卡尔空间和关节空间控制。

items.en: HyVLA-0.5 co-designs data, representation, policy refinement, and deployment execution for deployable generalist robots, rather than treating the VLA as a standalone policy. Cross-embodiment deployment relies on a complete set of components beyond model scale alone: high-fidelity UMI data provides reusable supervision for learning precise manipulation priors; the compact memory encoder and rel-EE/delta-chunk representation give the policy temporal context while keeping the action interface independent of platform-specific kinematics; FlowPRO converts real failure cases into compact offline refinement without requiring large-scale online exploration; and asynchronous chunk stitching makes the same checkpoint executable under real hardware latency. These components address different bottlenecks—data quality, action representation, failure correction, and deployment timing—but they share the same goal: preserving a stable policy interface while absorbing embodiment-specific differences outside the learned core. Together, they turn HyVLA-0.5 from a single model into a practical robot-learning stack for cross-embodiment deployment.
items.zh: HyVLA-0.5为可部署的通用机器人共同设计数据、表示、策略细化和部署执行，而不是将VLA视为独立策略。跨本体部署依赖于超越模型规模的完整组件集：高保真UMI数据为学习精确操作先验提供可重用监督；紧凑的记忆编码器和rel-EE/增量块表示为策略提供时间上下文，同时保持动作接口独立于平台特定运动学；FlowPRO将真实失败案例转化为紧凑的离线细化，无需大规模在线探索；异步块拼接使同一检查点在真实硬件延迟下可执行。这些组件解决不同瓶颈——数据质量、动作表示、失败修正和部署时序——但它们共享同一目标：在核心学习之外吸收本体特定差异的同时，保持稳定的策略接口。它们共同将HyVLA-0.5从单一模型转变为用于跨本体部署的实用机器人学习栈。

items.en: HyVLA-0.5 opens several questions that we are eager to explore, especially around data, model generalization, and real-world deployment. On the data side, an important direction is to move beyond motion capture while preserving high-precision supervision; exoskeleton-based collection is a promising route toward this goal. Since Hy-UMI-10K already provides high-accuracy action labels, it also offers a simple way to study the marginal value of precision for pre-training, for example by injecting controlled noise into the labels. In addition, the egocentric UMI camera still differs from robot-mounted deployment cameras, leaving room for systematic visual augmentation studies. To support these explorations, we will release a 2,0002{,}000-hour self-collected UMI subset and invite the community to study these questions and beyond.
items.zh: HyVLA-0.5提出了几个我们渴望探索的问题，特别是关于数据、模型泛化和真实世界部署。在数据方面，一个重要方向是在保持高精度监督的同时超越动作捕捉；基于外骨骼的收集是实现这一目标的有前途的途径。由于Hy-UMI-10K已经提供了高精度动作标签，它也提供了一种简单的方法来研究精度对预训练的边际价值，例如通过向标签注入受控噪声。此外，自我中心UMI相机仍然与机器人部署相机不同，为系统的视觉增强研究留下了空间。为支持这些探索，我们将发布一个2,000小时的自收集UMI子集，并邀请社区研究这些问题及更多。

items.en: Another key direction is real-world execution efficiency. In deployment, success is not only whether the robot can complete a task, but also whether it can execute at a practical task cadence. A key next step is therefore to improve deployment-time execution speed while maintaining safety and precision. This likely requires combining deployment-time adaptation with reinforcement learning.
items.zh: 另一个关键方向是真实世界执行效率。在部署中，成功不仅在于机器人能否完成任务，还在于它能否以实用的任务节奏执行。因此，下一个关键步骤是在保持安全性和精度的同时提高部署时的执行速度。这可能需要将部署时适应与强化学习相结合。

items.en: Finally, the emergence of embodied intelligence remains an important open direction. HyVLA-0.5 does not study zero-shot generalization, as we believe the current data scale is still insufficient for making such claims. At the same time, recent systems such as π0.7\pi_{0.7} [15] have begun to show early signs of zero-shot behavior, suggesting that larger-scale data and stronger pipelines may lead to qualitatively new capabilities. How to evaluate these capabilities rigorously, and how to use evaluation itself to drive the iteration of embodied models and deployment pipelines, remains an open problem.
items.zh: 最后，具身智能的出现仍然是一个重要的开放方向。HyVLA-0.5没有研究零样本泛化，因为我们相信当前的数据规模仍然不足以做出这样的声明。同时，最近的系统如π0.7 [15]已开始显示出零样本行为的早期迹象，表明更大规模的数据和更强的流程可能导致质的新能力。如何严格评估这些能力，以及如何使用评估本身来驱动具身模型和部署流程的迭代，仍然是一个开放问题。
